talents.name: Butchery
talents.description: Whenever you kill an enemy that grants experience or honor, you generate up to 20 runic power. In addition, you generate 2 runic power per 5 sec while in combat.

talents.name: Subversion
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Blood Strike, Scourge Strike, Heart Strike and Obliterate by 9%, and reduces threat generated while in Blood or Unholy Presence by 25%.

talents.name: Blade Barrier
talents.description: Whenever your Blood Runes are on cooldown, you gain the Blade Barrier effect, which decreases damage taken by 5% for the next 10 sec.

talents.name: Bladed Armor
talents.description: Increases your attack power by 5 for every 180 armor value you have.

talents.name: Scent of Blood
talents.description: You have a 15% chance after dodging, parrying or taking direct damage to gain the Scent of Blood effect, causing your next 3 melee hits to generate 10 runic power.

talents.name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with two-handed melee weapons by 4%.

talents.name: Rune Tap
talents.description: Converts 1 Blood Rune into 10% of your maximum health.

talents.name: Dark Conviction
talents.description: Increases your chance to critically hit with weapons, spells and abilities by 5%.

talents.name: Death Rune Mastery
talents.description: Whenever you hit with Death Strike or Obliterate there is a 100% chance that the Frost and Unholy Runes will become Death Runes when they activate. Death Runes count as a Blood, Frost or Unholy Rune.

talents.name: Improved Rune Tap
talents.description: Increases the health provided by Rune Tap by 100% and lowers its cooldown by 10 sec.

talents.name: Spell Deflection
talents.description: You have a chance equal to your Parry chance of taking 45% less damage from a direct damage spell.

talents.name: Vendetta
talents.description: Heals you for up to 6% of your maximum health whenever you kill a target that yields experience or honor.

talents.name: Bloody Strikes
talents.description: Increases the damage of Blood Strike by 15% and Heart Strike by 45%, and increases the damage of Blood Boil by 30%.

talents.name: Veteran of the Third War
talents.description: Increases your total Strength by 6%, your Stamina by 3%, and your expertise by 6.

talents.name: Mark of Blood
talents.description: Place a Mark of Blood on an enemy. Whenever the marked enemy deals damage to a target, that target is healed for 4% of its maximum health. Lasts for 20 sec or up to 20 hits.

talents.name: Bloody Vengeance
talents.description: Gives you a 3% bonus to physical damage you deal for 30 sec after dealing a critical strike from a weapon swing, spell, or ability. This effect stacks up to 3 times.

talents.name: Abomination's Might
talents.description: Increases the attack power by 10% of party and raid members within 100 yards. Also increases your total Strength by 2%.

talents.name: Bloodworms
talents.description: Your weapon hits have a 9% chance to cause the target to spawn 2-4 Bloodworms. Bloodworms attack your enemies, healing you as they do damage for 20 sec or until killed.

talents.name: Unholy Frenzy
talents.description: Induces a friendly unit into a killing frenzy for 30 sec. The target is Enraged, which increases their physical damage by 20%, but causes them to lose health equal to 1% of their maximum health every second.

talents.name: Improved Blood Presence
talents.description: While in Frost Presence or Unholy Presence, you retain 4% healing from Blood Presence, and healing done to you is increased by 10% in Blood Presence.

talents.name: Improved Death Strike
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Death Strike by 30%, increases its critical strike chance by 6%, and increases the healing granted by 50%.

talents.name: Sudden Doom
talents.description: Your Blood Strikes and Heart Strikes have a 15% chance to launch a free Death Coil at your target.

talents.name: Vampiric Blood
talents.description: Temporarily grants the Death Knight 15% of maximum health and increases the amount of health generated through spells and effects by 35% for 10 sec. After the effect expires, the health is lost.

talents.name: Will of the Necropolis
talents.description: Damage that would take you below 35% health or taken while you are at 35% health is reduced by 15%.

talents.name: Heart Strike
talents.description: Instantly strike the target and his nearest ally, causing 50% weapon damage plus 125 on the primary target, and 25% weapon damage plus 63 on the secondary target. Each target takes 10% additional damage for each of your diseases active on that target

talents.name: Might of Mograine
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Blood Boil, Blood Strike, Death Strike, and Heart Strike abilities by 45%.

talents.name: Blood Gorged
talents.description: When you are above 75% health, you deal 10% more damage. In addition, your attacks ignore up to 10% of your opponent's armor at all times.

talents.name: Improved Icy Touch
talents.description: Your Icy Touch does an additional 15% damage and your Frost Fever reduces melee and ranged attack speed by an additional 6%.

talents.name: Runic Power Mastery
talents.description: Increases your maximum Runic Power by 30.

talents.name: Toughness
talents.description: Increases your armor value from items by 10% and reduces the duration of all movement slowing effects by 30%.

talents.name: Icy Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Icy Touch, Chains of Ice and Howling Blast by 10 yards.

talents.name: Black Ice
talents.description: Increases your Frost and Shadow damage by 10%.

talents.name: Nerves of Cold Steel
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with one-handed melee weapons by 3% and increases the damage done by your offhand weapon by 25%.

talents.name: Icy Talons
talents.description: You leech heat from victims of your Frost Fever, so that when their melee attack speed is reduced, yours increases by 20% for the next 20 sec.

talents.name: Lichborne
talents.description: Draw upon unholy energy to become undead for 10 sec. While undead, you are immune to Charm, Fear and Sleep effects.

talents.name: Annihilation
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your melee special abilities by 3%. In addition, there is a 100% chance that your Obliterate will do its damage without consuming diseases.

talents.name: Killing Machine
talents.description: Your melee attacks have a chance to make your next Icy Touch, Howling Blast or Frost Strike a critical strike. Effect occurs more often than Killing Machine (Rank 4).

talents.name: Chill of the Grave
talents.description: Your Chains of Ice, Howling Blast, Icy Touch and Obliterate generate 5 additional runic power.

talents.name: Endless Winter
talents.description: Your strength is increased by 4% and your Mind Freeze no longer costs runic power.

talents.name: Frigid Dreadplate
talents.description: Reduces the chance melee attacks will hit you by 3%.

talents.name: Glacier Rot
talents.description: Diseased enemies take 20% more damage from your Icy Touch, Howling Blast and Frost Strike.

talents.name: Deathchill
talents.description: When activated, makes your next Icy Touch, Howling Blast, Frost Strike or Obliterate a critical hit if used within 30 sec.

talents.name: Improved Icy Talons
talents.description: Increases the melee haste of all party and raid members within 100 yds by 20% and your haste by an additional 5%.

talents.name: Merciless Combat
talents.description: Your Icy Touch, Howling Blast, Obliterate and Frost Strike do an additional 12% damage when striking targets with less than 35% health.

talents.name: Rime
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Icy Touch and Obliterate by 15% and casting Obliterate has a 15% chance to reset the cooldown on Howling Blast and cause your next Howling Blast to consume no runes.

talents.name: Chilblains
talents.description: Victims of your Frost Fever disease are Chilled, reducing movement speed by 50% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Hungering Cold
talents.description: Purges the earth around the Death Knight of all heat. Enemies within 10 yards are trapped in ice, preventing them from performing any action for 10 sec and infecting them with Frost Fever. Enemies are considered Frozen, but any damage other than diseases will break the ice.

talents.name: Improved Frost Presence
talents.description: While in Blood Presence or Unholy Presence, you retain 8% stamina from Frost Presence, and damage done to you is decreased by an additional 2% in Frost Presence.

talents.name: Threat of Thassarian
talents.description: When dual-wielding, your Death Strikes, Obliterates, Plague Strikes, Rune Strikes, Blood Strikes and Frost Strikes have a 100% chance to also deal damage with your offhand weapon.

talents.name: Blood of the North
talents.description: Increases Blood Strike and Frost Strike damage by 10%. In addition, whenever you hit with Blood Strike or Pestilence there is a 100% chance that the Blood Rune will become a Death Rune when it activates. Death Runes count as a Blood, Frost or Unholy Rune.

talents.name: Unbreakable Armor
talents.description: Reinforces your armor with a thick coat of ice, increasing your armor by 25% and increasing your Strength by 20% for 20 sec.

talents.name: Acclimation
talents.description: When you are hit by a spell, you have a 30% chance to boost your resistance to that type of magic for 18 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

talents.name: Frost Strike
talents.description: Instantly strike the enemy, causing 55% weapon damage plus 48 as Frost damage.

talents.name: Guile of Gorefiend
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Blood Strike, Frost Strike, Howling Blast and Obliterate abilities by 45%, and increases the duration of your Icebound Fortitude by 6 secs.

talents.name: Tundra Stalker
talents.description: Your spells and abilities deal 15% more damage to targets infected with Frost Fever. Also increases your expertise by 5.

talents.name: Vicious Strikes
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance by 6% and critical strike damage bonus by 30% of your Plague Strike and Scourge Strike.

talents.name: Virulence
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with your spells by 3% and reduces the chance that your damage over time diseases can be cured by 30%.

talents.name: Anticipation
talents.description: Increases your Dodge chance by 5%.

talents.name: Epidemic
talents.description: Increases the duration of Blood Plague and Frost Fever by 6 sec.

talents.name: Morbidity
talents.description: Increases the damage and healing of Death Coil by 15% and reduces the cooldown on Death and Decay by 15 sec.

talents.name: Unholy Command
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Death Grip ability by 10 sec.

talents.name: Ravenous Dead
talents.description: Increases your total Strength by 3% and the contribution your Ghouls get from your Strength and Stamina by 60%.

talents.name: Outbreak
talents.description: Increases the damage of Plague Strike by 20% and Scourge Strike by 13%.

talents.name: Necrosis
talents.description: Your auto attacks deal an additional 20% Shadow damage.

talents.name: Corpse Explosion
talents.description: Cause a corpse to explode for 166 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards. Will use a nearby corpse if the target is not a corpse. Does not affect mechanical or elemental corpses.

talents.name: On a Pale Horse
talents.description: You become as hard to stop as death itself. The duration of all Stun and Fear effects used against you is reduced by 20%, and your mounted speed is increased by 20%. This does not stack with other movement speed increasing effects.

talents.name: Blood-Caked Blade
talents.description: Your auto attacks have a 30% chance to cause a Blood-Caked Strike, which hits for 25% weapon damage plus 12.5% for each of your diseases on the target.

talents.name: Night of the Dead
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown on Raise Dead by 90 sec and the cooldown on Army of the Dead by 4 min. Also reduces the damage your pet takes from creature area of effect attacks by 90%.

talents.name: Unholy Blight
talents.description: Causes the victims of your Death Coil to be surrounded by a vile swarm of unholy insects, taking 10% of the damage done by the Death Coil over 10 sec, and preventing any diseases on the victim from being dispelled.

talents.name: Impurity
talents.description: The attack power bonus of your spells is increased by 20%.

talents.name: Dirge
talents.description: Your Death Strike, Plague Strike and Scourge Strike generate 5 additional runic power.

talents.name: Desecration
talents.description: Your Plague Strikes and Scourge Strikes cause the Desecrated Ground effect. Targets in the area are slowed by 50% by the grasping arms of the dead while standing on the unholy ground. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Magic Suppression
talents.description: You take 6% less damage from all magic. In addition, your Anti-Magic Shell absorbs an additional 25% of spell damage.

talents.name: Reaping
talents.description: Whenever you hit with Blood Strike or Pestilence there is a 100% chance that the Blood Rune becomes a Death Rune when it activates. Death Runes count as a Blood, Frost or Unholy Rune.

talents.name: Master of Ghouls
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown on Raise Dead by 60 sec, and the Ghoul summoned by your Raise Dead spell is considered a pet under your control. Unlike normal Death Knight Ghouls, your pet does not have a limited duration.

talents.name: Desolation
talents.description: Your Blood Strikes cause you to deal 5% additional damage with all attacks for the next 20 sec.

talents.name: Anti-Magic Zone
talents.description: Places a large, stationary Anti-Magic Zone that reduces spell damage done to party or raid members inside it by 75%. The Anti-Magic Zone lasts for 10 sec or until it absorbs (10000 + 2 * Attack power) spell damage.

talents.name: Improved Unholy Presence
talents.description: While in Blood Presence or Frost Presence, you retain 15% increased movement speed from Unholy Presence, and your runes finish their cooldowns 10% faster in Unholy Presence.

talents.name: Ghoul Frenzy
talents.description: Grants your pet 25% haste for 30 sec and heals it for 60% of its health over the duration.

talents.name: Crypt Fever
talents.description: Your diseases also cause Crypt Fever, which increases disease damage taken by the target by 30%.

talents.name: Bone Shield
talents.description: The Death Knight is surrounded by 3 whirling bones. While at least 1 bone remains, he takes 20% less damage from all sources and deals 2% more damage with all attacks, spells and abilities. Each damaging attack that lands consumes 1 bone. Lasts 5 min.

talents.name: Wandering Plague
talents.description: When your diseases damage an enemy, there is a chance equal to your melee critical strike chance that they will cause 100% additional damage to the target and all enemies within 8 yards. Ignores any target under the effect of a spell that is cancelled by taking damage.

talents.name: Ebon Plaguebringer
talents.description: Your Crypt Fever morphs into Ebon Plague, which increases magic damage taken by 13% in addition to increasing disease damage taken. Improves your critical strike chance with weapons and spells by 3% at all times.

talents.name: Scourge Strike
talents.description: An unholy strike that deals 70% of weapon damage as Physical damage plus 238. In addition, for each of your diseases on your target, you deal an additional 12% of the Physical damage done as Shadow damage.

talents.name: Rage of Rivendare
talents.description: Your spells and abilities deal 10% more damage to targets infected with Blood Plague.  Also increases your expertise by 5.

talents.name: Starlight Wrath
talents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Wrath and Starfire spells by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Genesis
talents.description: Increases the damage and healing done by your periodic spell damage and healing effects by 5%.

talents.name: Moonglow
talents.description: Reduces the Mana cost of your Moonfire, Starfire, Starfall, Wrath, Healing Touch, Nourish, Regrowth and Rejuvenation spells by 9%.

talents.name: Nature's Majesty
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Wrath, Starfire, Starfall, Nourish and Healing Touch spells by 4%.

talents.name: Improved Moonfire
talents.description: Increases the damage and critical strike chance of your Moonfire spell by 10%.

talents.name: Brambles
talents.description: Damage from your Thorns and Entangling Roots increased by 75% and damage done by your Treants increased by 15%. In addition, damage from your Treants and attacks done to you while you have Barkskin active have a 15% chance to daze the target for 3 sec.

talents.name: Nature's Grace
talents.description: All non-periodic spell criticals have a 100% chance to grace you with a blessing of nature, increasing your spell casting speed by 20% for 3 sec.

talents.name: Nature's Splendor
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Moonfire and Rejuvenation spells by 3 sec, your Regrowth spell by 6 sec, and your Insect Swarm and Lifebloom spells by 2 sec.

talents.name: Nature's Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Balance spells and Faerie Fire (Feral) ability by 20%, and reduces the threat generated by your Balance spells by 30%.

talents.name: Vengeance
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Starfire, Starfall, Moonfire, and Wrath spells by 100%.

talents.name: Celestial Focus
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Starfire, Hibernate and Hurricane by 70% and increases your total spell haste by 3%.

talents.name: Lunar Guidance
talents.description: Increases your spell power by 12% of your total Intellect.

talents.name: Insect Swarm
talents.description: The enemy target is swarmed by insects, decreasing their chance to hit by 3% and causing 144 Nature damage over 12 sec.

talents.name: Improved Insect Swarm
talents.description: Increases your damage done by your Wrath spell to targets afflicted by your Insect Swarm by 3%, and increases the critical strike chance of your Starfire spell by 3% on targets afflicted by your Moonfire spell.

talents.name: Dreamstate
talents.description: Regenerate mana equal to 10% of your Intellect every 5 sec, even while casting.

talents.name: Moonfury
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Starfire, Moonfire and Wrath spells by 10%.

talents.name: Balance of Power
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with all spells by 4% and reduces your damage taken from all spells by 6%.

talents.name: Moonkin Form
talents.description: Shapeshift into Moonkin Form. While in this form the armor contribution from items is increased by 370%, damage taken while stunned is reduced by 15%, and all party and raid members within 100 yards have their spell critical chance increased by 5%. Single target spell critical strikes in this form instantly regenerate 2% of your total mana. The Moonkin can not cast healing or resurrection spells while shapeshifted. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

talents.name: Improved Moonkin Form
talents.description: Your Moonkin Aura also causes affected targets to gain 3% haste and you to gain 30% of your spirit as additional spell damage.

talents.name: Improved Faerie Fire
talents.description: Your Faerie Fire spell also increases the chance the target will be hit by spell attacks by 3%, and increases the critical strike chance of your damage spells by 3% on targets afflicted by Faerie Fire.

talents.name: Owlkin Frenzy
talents.description: Attacks done to you while in Moonkin form have a 15% chance to cause you to go into a Frenzy, increasing your damage by 10%, cause you to be immune to pushback while casting Balance spells and restore 2% base mana every 2 sec. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Wrath of Cenarius
talents.description: Your Starfire spell gains an additional 20% and your Wrath gains an additional 10% of your bonus damage effects.

talents.name: Eclipse
talents.description: When you critically hit with Starfire, you have a 100% chance of increasing damage done by Wrath by 40%. When you critically hit with Wrath, you have a 60% chance of increasing your critical strike chance with Starfire by 40%. Each effect lasts 15 sec and each has a separate 30 sec cooldown. Both effects cannot occur simultaneously.

talents.name: Typhoon
talents.description: You summon a violent Typhoon that does 400 Nature damage when in contact with hostile targets, knocking them back and dazing them for 6 sec.

talents.name: Force of Nature
talents.description: Summons 3 treants to attack enemy targets for 30 sec.

talents.name: Gale Winds
talents.description: Increases damage done by your Hurricane and Typhoon spells by 30%, and increases the range of your Cyclone spell by 4 yards.

talents.name: Earth and Moon
talents.description: Your Wrath and Starfire spells have a 100% chance to apply the Earth and Moon effect, which increases spell damage taken by 13% for 12 sec. Also increases your spell damage by 6%.

talents.name: Ferocity
talents.description: Reduces the cost of your Maul, Swipe, Claw, Rake and Mangle abilities by 5 Rage or Energy.

talents.name: Feral Aggression
talents.description: Increases the attack power reduction of your Demoralizing Roar by 40% and the damage caused by your Ferocious Bite by 15%.

talents.name: Feral Instinct
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Swipe ability by 30% and reduces the chance enemies have to detect you while Prowling.

talents.name: Savage Fury
talents.description: Increases the damage caused by your Claw, Rake, Mangle (Cat), Mangle (Bear), and Maul abilities by 20%.

talents.name: Thick Hide
talents.description: Increases your Armor contribution from cloth and leather items by 30%.

talents.name: Feral Swiftness
talents.description: Increases your movement speed by 30% in Cat Form and increases your chance to dodge while in Cat Form, Bear Form and Dire Bear Form by 4%.

talents.name: Survival Instincts
talents.description: When activated, this ability temporarily grants you 30% of your maximum health for 20 sec while in Bear Form, Cat Form, or Dire Bear Form. After the effect expires, the health is lost.

talents.name: Sharpened Claws
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance while in Bear, Dire Bear or Cat Form by 6%.

talents.name: Shredding Attacks
talents.description: Reduces the energy cost of your Shred ability by 18 and the rage cost of your Lacerate ability by 2.

talents.name: Predatory Strikes
talents.description: Increases your melee attack power in Cat, Bear and Dire Bear Forms by 150% of your level and 20% of any attack power on your equipped weapon. In addition, your finishing moves have a 20% chance per combo point to make your next Nature spell with a base casting time less than 10 sec. become an instant cast spell.

talents.name: Primal Fury
talents.description: Gives you a 50% chance to gain an additional 5 Rage anytime you get a critical strike while in Bear and Dire Bear Form and your critical strikes from Cat Form abilities that add combo points have a 100% chance to add an additional combo point.

talents.name: Primal Precision
talents.description: Increases your expertise by 10, and you are refunded 80% of the energy cost of a finishing move if it fails to land.

talents.name: Brutal Impact
talents.description: Increases the stun duration of your Bash and Pounce abilities by 1 sec and decreases the cooldown of Bash by 30 sec.

talents.name: Feral Charge
talents.description: Teaches Feral Charge (Bear) and Feral Charge (Cat). Feral Charge (Bear) - Causes you to charge an enemy, immobilizing and interrupting any spell being cast for 4 sec. This ability can be used in Bear Form and Dire Bear Form. 15 second cooldown. Feral Charge (Cat) - Causes you to leap behind an enemy, dazing them for 3 sec. 30 second cooldown.

talents.name: Nurturing Instinct
talents.description: Increases your healing spells by up to 70% of your Agility, and increases healing done to you by 20% while in Cat form.

talents.name: Natural Reaction
talents.description: Increases your dodge while in Bear Form or Dire Bear Form by 6%, and you regenerate 3 rage every time you dodge while in Bear Form or Dire Bear Form.

talents.name: Heart of the Wild
talents.description: Increases your Intellect by 20%. In addition, while in Bear or Dire Bear Form your Stamina is increased by 10% and while in Cat Form your attack power is increased by 10%.

talents.name: Survival of the Fittest
talents.description: Increases all attributes by 6%, reduces the chance you'll be critically hit by melee attacks by 6%, and increases your armor contribution from cloth and leather items in Bear Form and Dire Bear Form by 33%.

talents.name: Leader of the Pack
talents.description: While in Cat, Bear or Dire Bear Form, the Leader of the Pack increases ranged and melee critical chance of all party and raid members within 100 yards by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Leader of the Pack
talents.description: Your Leader of the Pack ability also causes affected targets to heal themselves for 4% of their total health when they critically hit with a melee or ranged attack. The healing effect cannot occur more than once every 6 sec. In addition, you gain 8% of your maximum mana when you benefit from this heal.

talents.name: Primal Tenacity
talents.description: Reduces the duration of fear effects by 30%, reduces all damage taken while stunned by 30% while in Cat Form.

talents.name: Protector of the Pack
talents.description: Increases your attack power by 6% and reduces the damage you take by 12%, while in Bear or Dire Bear Form.

talents.name: Predatory Instincts
talents.description: While in Cat Form increases your damage from melee critical strikes by 10% and reduces the damage taken from area of effect attacks by 30%.

talents.name: Infected Wounds
talents.description: Your Shred, Maul, and Mangle attacks cause an Infected Wound in the target. The Infected Wound reduces the movement speed of the target by 50% and the attack speed by 20%. Lasts 12 sec.

talents.name: King of the Jungle
talents.description: While using your Enrage ability in Bear Form or Dire Bear Form, your damage is increased by 15%, and your Tiger's Fury ability also instantly restores 60 energy. In addition, the mana cost of Bear Form, Cat Form, and Dire Bear Form is reduced by 60%.

talents.name: Mangle
talents.description: Mangle the target, inflicting damage and causing the target to take additional damage from bleed effects for 1 min. This ability can be used in Cat Form or Dire Bear Form.

talents.name: Improved Mangle
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Mangle (Bear) ability by 1.5 sec., and reduces the energy cost of your Mangle (Cat) ability by 6.

talents.name: Rend and Tear
talents.description: Increases damage done by your Maul and Shred attacks on bleeding targets by 20%, and increases the critical strike chance of your Ferocious Bite ability on bleeding targets by 25%.

talents.name: Primal Gore
talents.description: Grants the periodic damage from your Lacerate and Rip abilities the ability to critically hit.

talents.name: Improved Mark of the Wild
talents.description: Increases the effects of your Mark of the Wild and Gift of the Wild spells by 40%, and increases all of your total attributes by 2%.

talents.name: Nature's Focus
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Healing Touch, Wrath, Entangling Roots, Cyclone, Nourish, Regrowth and Tranquility by 70%.

talents.name: Furor
talents.description: Gives you 100% chance to gain 10 Rage when you shapeshift into Bear and Dire Bear Form, and you keep up to 100 of your Energy when you shapeshift into Cat Form, and increases your total Intellect while in Moonkin form by 10%.

talents.name: Naturalist
talents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Healing Touch spell by 0.5 sec and increases the damage you deal with physical attacks in all forms by 10%.

talents.name: Subtlety
talents.description: Reduces the threat generated by your restoration spells by 30% and reduces the chance your helpful spells, Moonfire, and Insect Swarm will be dispelled by 30%.

talents.name: Natural Shapeshifter
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of all shapeshifting by 30%.

talents.name: Intensity
talents.description: Allows 50% of your Mana regeneration to continue while casting and causes your Enrage ability to instantly generate 10 rage.

talents.name: Omen of Clarity
talents.description: Each of the Druid's damage spells, healing spells, and auto attacks has a chance of causing the caster to enter a Clearcasting state. The Clearcasting state reduces the Mana, Rage or Energy cost of your next damage, healing spell or offensive ability by 100%.

talents.name: Master Shapeshifter
talents.description: Grants an effect which lasts while the Druid is within the respective shapeshift form. Bear Form - Increases physical damage by 4%. Cat Form - Increases critical strike chance by 4%. Moonkin Form - Increases spell damage by 4%. Tree of Life Form - Increases healing by 4%.

talents.name: Tranquil Spirit
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Healing Touch, Nourish and Tranquility spells by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Rejuvenation
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Rejuvenation spell by 15%.

talents.name: Nature's Swiftness
talents.description: When activated, your next Nature spell with a base casting time less than 10 sec. becomes an instant cast spell.

talents.name: Gift of Nature
talents.description: Increases the effect of all healing spells by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Tranquility
talents.description: Reduces threat caused by Tranquility by 100%, and reduces the cooldown by 60%.

talents.name: Empowered Touch
talents.description: Your Healing Touch spell gains an additional 40% and your Nourish spell gains an additional 20% of your bonus healing effects.

talents.name: Nature's Bounty
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your Regrowth and Nourish spells by 25%.

talents.name: Living Spirit
talents.description: Increases your total Spirit by 15%.

talents.name: Swiftmend
talents.description: Consumes a Rejuvenation or Regrowth effect on a friendly target to instantly heal them an amount equal to 12 sec. of Rejuvenation or 18 sec. of Regrowth.

talents.name: Natural Perfection
talents.description: Your critical strike chance with all spells is increased by 3% and critical strikes against you give you the Natural Perfection effect reducing all damage taken by 4%. Stacks up to 3 times. Lasts 8 sec.

talents.name: Empowered Rejuvenation
talents.description: The bonus healing effects of your healing over time spells is increased by 20%.

talents.name: Living Seed
talents.description: When you critically heal your target with Swiftmend, Regrowth, Nourish or Healing Touch spell you have a 100% chance to plant a Living Seed on the target for 30% of the amount healed. The Living Seed will bloom when the target is next attacked. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Revitalize
talents.description: Your Rejuvenation and Wild Growth spells have a 15% chance to restore 8 Energy, 4 Rage, 1% Mana or 16 Runic Power per tick.

talents.name: Tree of Life
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your healing over time spells by 20% and grants the ability to shapeshift into the Tree of Life. While in this form you increase healing received by 6% for all party and raid members within 100 yards, and you can only cast Restoration spells in addition to Innervate, Barkskin, Nature's Grasp and Thorns spells. The act of shapeshifting frees the caster of Polymorph and Movement Impairing effects.

talents.name: Improved Tree of Life
talents.description: Increases your armor contribution from items while in Tree of Life Form by 200%, and increases your healing spell power by 15% of your spirit while in Tree of Life Form.

talents.name: Improved Barkskin
talents.description: Grants 160% additional armor contribution from cloth and leather items while in Travel Form or while not shapeshifted, increases the damage reduction granted by your Barkskin spell by 10% and reduces the chance your Barkskin is dispelled by 70%.

talents.name: Gift of the Earthmother
talents.description: Increases your total spell haste by 10% and reduces your global cooldown by 10% when casting Lifebloom.

talents.name: Improved Aspect of the Hawk
talents.description: While Aspect of the Hawk or Dragonhawk is active, all normal ranged attacks have a 10% chance of increasing ranged attack speed by 15% for 12 sec.

talents.name: Endurance Training
talents.description: Increases the health of your pet by 10% and your total health by 5%.

talents.name: Focused Fire
talents.description: All damage caused by you is increased by 2% while your pet is active and the critical strike chance of your pet's special abilities is increased by 20% while Kill Command is active.

talents.name: Improved Aspect of the Monkey
talents.description: Increases the Dodge bonus of your Aspect of the Monkey and Aspect of the Dragonhawk by 6%.

talents.name: Thick Hide
talents.description: Increases the armor rating of your pets by 20% and your armor contribution from items by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Revive Pet
talents.description: Revive Pet's casting time is reduced by 6 sec, mana cost is reduced by 40%, and increases the health your pet returns with by an additional 30%.

talents.name: Pathfinding
talents.description: Increases the speed bonus of your Aspect of the Cheetah and Aspect of the Pack by 8%, and increases your speed while mounted by 10%. The mounted movement speed increase does not stack with other effects.

talents.name: Aspect Mastery
talents.description: Aspect of the Viper - Reduces the damage penalty by 10%. Aspect of the Monkey - Reduces the damage done to you while active by 5%. Aspect of the Hawk - Increases the attack power bonus by 30%. Aspect of the Dragonhawk - Combines the bonuses from Aspect of the Monkey and Hawk.

talents.name: Unleashed Fury
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your pets by 15%.

talents.name: Improved Mend Pet
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Mend Pet spell by 10% and gives the Mend Pet spell a 50% chance of cleansing 1 Curse, Disease, Magic or Poison effect from the pet each tick.

talents.name: Ferocity
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your pet by 10%.

talents.name: Spirit Bond
talents.description: While your pet is active, you and your pet will regenerate 2% of total health every 10 sec., and increases healing done to you and your pet by 10%.

talents.name: Intimidation
talents.description: Command your pet to intimidate the target, causing a high amount of threat and stunning the target for 3 sec. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Bestial Discipline
talents.description: Increases the Focus regeneration of your pets by 100%.

talents.name: Animal Handler
talents.description: Increases your pet's attack power by 10%, and increases the duration of your Master's Call effect by 6 sec.

talents.name: Frenzy
talents.description: Gives your pet a 100% chance to gain a 30% attack speed increase for 8 sec after dealing a critical strike.

talents.name: Ferocious Inspiration
talents.description: All party and raid members have all damage increased by 3% within 100 yards of your pet. In addition, increases the damage dealt by Arcane Shot and Steady Shot by 9%.

talents.name: Bestial Wrath
talents.description: Send your pet into a rage causing 50% additional damage for 10 sec. While enraged, the beast does not feel pity or remorse or fear and it cannot be stopped unless killed.

talents.name: Catlike Reflexes
talents.description: Increases your chance to dodge by 3% and your pet's chance to dodge by an additional 9%. In addition, reduces the cooldown of your Kill Command ability by 30 sec.

talents.name: Invigoration
talents.description: When your pet scores a critical hit with a special ability, you have a 100% chance to instantly regenerate 1% mana.

talents.name: Serpent's Swiftness
talents.description: Increases ranged combat attack speed by 20% and your pet's melee attack speed by 20%.

talents.name: Longevity
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Bestial Wrath, Intimidation and Pet Special Abilities by 30%.

talents.name: The Beast Within
talents.description: Increases all damage you deal by 10% and while your pet is under the effects of Bestial Wrath, you also go into a rage causing 10% additional damage and reducing mana costs of all spells by 50% for 10 sec. While enraged, you do not feel pity or remorse or fear and you cannot be stopped unless killed.

talents.name: Cobra Strikes
talents.description: You have a 60% chance when you critically hit with Arcane Shot, Steady Shot or Kill Shot to cause your pet's next 2 special attacks to critically hit.

talents.name: Kindred Spirits
talents.description: Increases your pet's damage by 20% and you and your pet's movement speed by 10% while your pet is active. This does not stack with other movement speed increasing effects.

talents.name: Improved Concussive Shot
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Concussive Shot's daze effect by 2 sec.

talents.name: Focused Aim
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Steady Shot by 70%, and increases your chance to hit by 3%.

talents.name: Lethal Shots
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance with ranged weapons by 5%.

talents.name: Careful Aim
talents.description: Increases your ranged attack power by an amount equal to 100% of your total Intellect.

talents.name: Improved Hunter's Mark
talents.description: Increases the bonus attack power granted by your Hunter's Mark ability by 30%, and reduces the mana cost of your Hunter's Mark ability by 100%.

talents.name: Mortal Shots
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your ranged abilities by 30%.

talents.name: Go for the Throat
talents.description: Your ranged critical hits cause your pet to generate 50 Focus.

talents.name: Improved Arcane Shot
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Arcane Shot by 15%.

talents.name: Aimed Shot
talents.description: An aimed shot that increases ranged damage by 5 and reduces healing done to that target by 50%. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Rapid Killing
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Rapid Fire ability by 2 min. In addition, after killing an opponent that yields experience or honor, your next Aimed Shot, Arcane Shot or Chimera Shot causes 20% additional damage. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Improved Stings
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Serpent Sting and Wyvern Sting by 30% and the mana drained by your Viper Sting by 30%. In addition, reduces the chance your Sting damage over time effects will be dispelled by 30%.

talents.name: Efficiency
talents.description: Reduces the Mana cost of your Shots and Stings by 15%.

talents.name: Concussive Barrage
talents.description: Your successful Chimera Shot and Multi-Shot attacks have a 100% chance to Daze the target for 4 sec.

talents.name: Readiness
talents.description: When activated, this ability immediately finishes the cooldown on your other Hunter abilities except Bestial Wrath.

talents.name: Barrage
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Multi-Shot, Aimed Shot, and Volley spells by 12%.

talents.name: Combat Experience
talents.description: Increases your total Agility and Intellect by 4%.

talents.name: Ranged Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with ranged weapons by 5%.

talents.name: Piercing Shots
talents.description: Your critical Aimed, Steady and Chimera Shots cause the target to bleed for 30% of the damage dealt over 8 sec.

talents.name: Trueshot Aura
talents.description: Increases the attack power of party and raid members within 100 yards by 10%. Lasts until cancelled.

talents.name: Improved Barrage
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Multi-Shot and Aimed Shot abilities by 12% and reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while channeling Volley by 100%.

talents.name: Master Marksman
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 5%, and reduces the Mana cost of your Steady Shot, Aimed Shot, and Chimera Shot by 25%.

talents.name: Rapid Recuperation
talents.description: You gain 4% of your mana every 3 sec while under the effect of Rapid Fire, and you gain 2% of your mana every 2 sec for 6 sec when you gain Rapid Killing.

talents.name: Wild Quiver
talents.description: You have a 12% chance to shoot an additional shot when doing damage with your auto shot, dealing 80% weapon nature damage. Wild Quiver consumes no ammo.

talents.name: Silencing Shot
talents.description: A shot that deals 50% weapon damage and Silences the target for 3 sec. Non-player victim spellcasting is also interrupted for 3 sec.

talents.name: Improved Steady Shot
talents.description: Your Steady Shot hits have a 15% chance to increase the damage done by your next Aimed Shot, Arcane Shot or Chimera Shot by 15%, and reduce the mana cost of your next Aimed Shot, Arcane Shot or Chimera Shot by 20%.

talents.name: Marked for Death
talents.description: Increases your damage done by your shots and the damage done by your pet's special abilities by 5% on marked targets, and increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Aimed Shot, Arcane Shot, Steady Shot, Kill Shot and Chimera Shot by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Tracking
talents.description: While tracking Beasts, Demons, Dragonkin, Elementals, Giants, Humanoids and Undead, all damage done to those types by the Hunter is increased by 5%.

talents.name: Hawk Eye
talents.description: Increases the range of your ranged weapons by 6 yards.

talents.name: Savage Strikes
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Raptor Strike, Mongoose Bite and Counterattack by 20%.

talents.name: Surefooted
talents.description: Reduces the duration of movement impairing effects by 30%.

talents.name: Entrapment
talents.description: When your Frost Trap or Snake Trap are triggered you entrap all afflicted targets, preventing them from moving for 4 sec.

talents.name: Trap Mastery
talents.description: Frost Trap and Freezing Trap - Increases the duration by 30%. Immolation Trap, Explosive Trap and Black Arrow - Increases the periodic damage done by 30%. Snake Trap - Increases the number of snakes summoned by 6.

talents.name: Survival Instincts
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 4% and increases the critical strike chance of your Arcane Shot, Steady Shot, and Explosive Shot by 4%.

talents.name: Survivalist
talents.description: Increases your Stamina by 10%.

talents.name: Scatter Shot
talents.description: A short-range shot that deals 50% weapon damage and disorients the target for 4 sec. Any damage caused will remove the effect. Turns off your attack when used.

talents.name: Deflection
talents.description: Increases your chance to parry by 3%, and reduces the duration of all Disarm effects used against you by 50%. This does not stack with other Disarm duration reducing effects.

talents.name: Survival Tactics
talents.description: Reduces the chance your Feign Death ability and all trap spells will be resisted by 4%, and reduces the cooldown of your Disengage ability by 4 sec.

talents.name: T.N.T.
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Explosive Shot, Explosive Trap, Black Arrow and Immolation Trap by 6%.

talents.name: Lock and Load
talents.description: You have a 100% chance when you trap a target with Freezing Trap, Freezing Arrow or Frost Trap and a 6% chance when you deal periodic damage with your Immolation Trap, Explosive Trap or Black Arrow to cause your next 2 Arcane Shot or Explosive Shot spells to trigger no cooldown, cost no mana and consume no ammo. This effect has a 22 sec cooldown.

talents.name: Hunter vs. Wild
talents.description: Increases you and your pet's attack power and ranged attack power equal to 30% of your total Stamina.

talents.name: Killer Instinct
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance with all attacks by 3%.

talents.name: Counterattack
talents.description: A strike that becomes active after parrying an opponent's attack. This attack deals (Attack power * 0.2 + 48) damage and immobilizes the target for 5 sec. Counterattack cannot be blocked, dodged, or parried.

talents.name: Lightning Reflexes
talents.description: Increases your Agility by 15%.

talents.name: Resourcefulness
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of all traps, melee abilities and Black Arrow by 60% and reduces the cooldown of all traps and Black Arrow by 6 sec.

talents.name: Expose Weakness
talents.description: Your ranged criticals have a 100% chance to grant you Expose Weakness. Expose Weakness increases your attack power by 25% of your Agility for 7 sec.

talents.name: Wyvern Sting
talents.description: A stinging shot that puts the target to sleep for 30 sec. Any damage will cancel the effect. When the target wakes up, the Sting causes 300 Nature damage over 6 sec. Only one Sting per Hunter can be active on the target at a time.

talents.name: Thrill of the Hunt
talents.description: Gives you a 100% chance to regain 40% of the mana cost of any shot when it critically hits.

talents.name: Master Tactician
talents.description: Your successful ranged attacks have a 10% chance to increase your critical strike chance with all attacks by 10% for 8 sec.

talents.name: Noxious Stings
talents.description: If Wyvern Sting is dispelled, the dispeller is also afflicted by Wyvern Sting lasting 50% of the duration remaining, and increases all damage done by you on targets afflicted by your Serpent Sting by 3%.

talents.name: Point of No Escape
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of all of your attacks on targets affected by your Frost Trap, Freezing Trap and Freezing Arrow by 6%.

talents.name: Black Arrow
talents.description: Fires a Black Arrow at the target, increasing all damage done by you to the target by 6% and dealing (Ranged attack power * 0.1 + 157 * 5) Shadow damage over 15 sec. Black Arrow shares a cooldown with Trap spells.

talents.name: Sniper Training
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Kill Shot ability by 15%, and while standing still for 6 sec, you gain Sniper Training increasing the damage done by your Steady Shot, Aimed Shot, Black Arrow and Explosive Shot by 6% for 15 sec.

talents.name: Hunting Party
talents.description: Increases your total Agility by an additional 3%, and your Arcane Shot, Explosive Shot and Steady Shot critical strikes have a 100% chance to grant up to 10 party or raid members mana regeneration equal to 1% of the maximum mana per 5 sec. Lasts for 15 sec.

talents.name: Arcane Subtlety
talents.description: Reduces the chance your helpful spells and damage over time effects will be dispelled by 30% and reduces the threat caused by your Arcane spells by 40%.

talents.name: Arcane Focus
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit and reduces the mana cost of your Arcane spells by 3%.

talents.name: Arcane Stability
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Arcane Missiles and Arcane Blast by 100%.

talents.name: Arcane Fortitude
talents.description: Increases your armor by an amount equal to 150% of your Intellect.

talents.name: Magic Absorption
talents.description: Increases all resistances by 1 per level and causes all spells you fully resist to restore 2% of your total mana. 1 sec cooldown.

talents.name: Arcane Concentration
talents.description: Gives you a 10% chance of entering a Clearcasting state after any damage spell hits a target. The Clearcasting state reduces the mana cost of your next damage spell by 100%.

talents.name: Magic Attunement
talents.description: Increases the range of your Arcane spells by 6 yards and the effect of your Amplify Magic and Dampen Magic spells by 50%.

talents.name: Spell Impact
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Arcane Explosion, Arcane Blast, Blast Wave, Fire Blast, Scorch, Fireball, Ice Lance and Cone of Cold spells by an additional 6%.

talents.name: Student of the Mind
talents.description: Increases your total Spirit by 10%.

talents.name: Focus Magic
talents.description: Increases the target's chance to critically hit with spells by 3%. When the target critically hits the caster's chance to critically hit with spells is increased by 3% for 10 sec. Cannot be cast on self.

talents.name: Arcane Shielding
talents.description: Decreases the mana lost per point of damage taken when Mana Shield is active by 33% and increases the resistances granted by Mage Armor by 50%.

talents.name: Improved Counterspell
talents.description: Your Counterspell also silences the target for 4 sec.

talents.name: Arcane Meditation
talents.description: Allows 50% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting.

talents.name: Torment the Weak
talents.description: Your Frostbolt, Fireball, Frostfire Bolt, Pyroblast, Arcane Missiles, Arcane Blast, and Arcane Barrage abilities deal 12% more damage to snared or slowed targets.

talents.name: Improved Blink
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of Blink by 50% and for 4 sec after casting your chance to be hit by all attacks and spells is reduced by 30%.

talents.name: Presence of Mind
talents.description: When activated, your next Mage spell with a casting time less than 10 sec becomes an instant cast spell.

talents.name: Arcane Mind
talents.description: Increases your total Intellect by 15%.

talents.name: Prismatic Cloak
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 6% and reduces the fade time of your Invisibility spell by 3 sec.

talents.name: Arcane Instability
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your spells and your critical strike chance by 3%.

talents.name: Arcane Potency
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your next damaging spell by 30% after gaining Clearcasting or Presence of Mind.

talents.name: Arcane Empowerment
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Arcane Missiles spell by an amount equal to 45% of your spell power and the damage of your Arcane Blast by 9% of your spell power. In addition, increases the damage of all party and raid members within 100 yds by 3%.

talents.name: Arcane Power
talents.description: When activated, your spells deal 20% more damage while costing 20% more mana to cast. This effect lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Incanter's Absorption
talents.description: When your Mana Shield, Frost Ward, Fire Ward, or Ice Barrier absorbs damage your spell damage is increased by 15% of the amount absorbed for 10 sec.

talents.name: Arcane Flows
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Presence of Mind, Arcane Power and Invisibility spells by 30% and the cooldown of your Evocation spell by 2 min.

talents.name: Mind Mastery
talents.description: Increases spell power by 15% of your total Intellect.

talents.name: Slow
talents.description: Reduces target's movement speed by 60%, increases the time between ranged attacks by 60% and increases casting time by 30%. Lasts 15 sec. Slow can only affect one target at a time.

talents.name: Missile Barrage
talents.description: Gives your Arcane Blast a 40% chance, and your Arcane Barrage, Fireball, Frostbolt and Frostfire Bolt spells a 20% chance to reduce the channeled duration of the next Arcane Missiles spell by 2.5 secs, reduce the mana cost by 100%, and missiles will fire every .5 secs.

talents.name: Netherwind Presence
talents.description: Increases your spell haste by 6%.

talents.name: Spell Power
talents.description: Increases critical strike damage bonus of all spells by 50%.

talents.name: Improved Fire Blast
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Fire Blast spell by 2 sec.

talents.name: Incineration
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Fire Blast, Scorch, Arcane Blast and Cone of Cold spells by 6%.

talents.name: Improved Fireball
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Fireball spell by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Ignite
talents.description: Your critical strikes from Fire damage spells cause the target to burn for an additional 40% of your spell's damage over 4 sec.

talents.name: Burning Determination
talents.description: When Interrupted or Silenced you have a 100% chance to become immune to the next Interrupt or Silence mechanic. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: World in Flames
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Flamestrike, Pyroblast, Blast Wave, Dragon's Breath, Living Bomb, Blizzard and Arcane Explosion spells by 6%.

talents.name: Flame Throwing
talents.description: Increases the range of all Fire spells except Frostfire Bolt by 6 yards.

talents.name: Impact
talents.description: Gives your damaging spells a 10% chance to cause the next Fire Blast you cast to stun the target for 2 sec.

talents.name: Pyroblast
talents.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes 148 to 195 Fire damage and an additional 56 Fire damage over 12 sec.

talents.name: Burning Soul
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Fire spells by 70% and reduces the threat caused by your Fire spells by 20%.

talents.name: Improved Scorch
talents.description: Increases your chance to critically hit with Scorch, Fireball and Frostfire Bolt by an additional 3% and your damaging Scorch spells have a 100% chance to cause your target to be vulnerable to spell damage, increasing spell critical strike chance against that target by 5% and lasts 30 sec.

talents.name: Molten Shields
talents.description: Causes your Fire Ward and Frost Ward spells to have a 30% chance to reflect the warded spell while active. In addition, your Molten Armor has a 100% chance to affect ranged and spell attacks.

talents.name: Master of Elements
talents.description: Your spell criticals will refund 30% of their base mana cost.

talents.name: Playing with Fire
talents.description: Increases all spell damage caused by 3% and all spell damage taken by 3%.

talents.name: Critical Mass
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Fire spells by 6%.

talents.name: Blast Wave
talents.description: A wave of flame radiates outward from the caster, damaging all enemies caught within the blast for 160 to 192 Fire damage, knocking them back and dazing them for 6 sec.

talents.name: Blazing Speed
talents.description: Gives you a 10% chance when hit by a melee or ranged attack to increase your movement speed by 50% and dispel all movement impairing effects. This effect lasts 8 sec.

talents.name: Fire Power
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 10%.

talents.name: Pyromaniac
talents.description: Increases chance to critically hit by 3% and allows 50% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting.

talents.name: Combustion
talents.description: When activated, this spell increases your critical strike damage bonus with Fire damage spells by 50%, and causes each of your Fire damage spell hits to increase your critical strike chance with Fire damage spells by 10%. This effect lasts until you have caused 3 non-periodic critical strikes with Fire spells.

talents.name: Molten Fury
talents.description: Increases damage of all spells against targets with less than 35% health by 12%.

talents.name: Fiery Payback
talents.description: When below 35% health all damage taken is reduced by 20% and your Pyroblast spell's cast time is reduced by 3.5 secs while the cooldown is increased by 5 secs. In addition, melee and ranged attacks made against you have a 10% chance to disarm your attacker's main hand and ranged weapons.

talents.name: Empowered Fire
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Fireball, Frostfire Bolt and Pyroblast spells by an amount equal to 15% of your spell power. In addition, each time your Ignite talent causes damage, you have a 100% chance to regain 2% of your base mana.

talents.name: Firestarter
talents.description: Your damaging Blast Wave and Dragon's Breath spells have a 100% chance to make your next Flamestrike spell instant cast and cost no mana. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Dragon's Breath
talents.description: Targets in a cone in front of the caster take 382 to 442 Fire damage and are Disoriented for 5 sec. Any direct damaging attack will revive targets. Turns off your attack when used.

talents.name: Hot Streak
talents.description: Any time you score 2 non-periodic spell criticals in a row using Fireball, Fire Blast, Scorch, Living Bomb, or Frostfire Bolt, you have a 100% chance the next Pyroblast spell cast within 10 sec will be instant cast.

talents.name: Burnout
talents.description: Increases your spell critical damage bonus with all spells by 50% but your non-periodic spell criticals cost an additional 5% of the spell's cost.

talents.name: Frostbite
talents.description: Gives your Chill effects a 15% chance to freeze the target for 5 sec.

talents.name: Improved Frostbolt
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Frostbolt spell by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Ice Floes
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, Ice Block and Icy Veins spells by 20%.

talents.name: Ice Shards
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Frost spells by 100%.

talents.name: Frost Warding
talents.description: Increases the armor and resistances given by your Frost Armor and Ice Armor spells by 50%. In addition, gives your Frost Ward and Fire Ward a 30% chance to negate the warded damage spell and restore mana equal to the damage caused.

talents.name: Precision
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost and increases your chance to hit with spells by 3%.

talents.name: Permafrost
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Chill effects by 2 sec, reduces the target's speed by an additional 10%, and reduces the target's healing received by 20%.

talents.name: Piercing Ice
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Frost spells by 6%.

talents.name: Icy Veins
talents.description: Hastens your spellcasting, increasing spell casting speed by 20% and reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting by 100%. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Improved Blizzard
talents.description: Adds a chill effect to your Blizzard spell. This effect lowers the target's movement speed by 50%. Lasts 1.50 sec

talents.name: Arctic Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Frostbolt, Ice Lance, Deep Freeze and Blizzard spells and the radius of your Frost Nova and Cone of Cold spells by 20%.

talents.name: Frost Channeling
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of all spells by 10% and reduces the threat caused by your Frost spells by 10%.

talents.name: Shatter
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of all your spells against frozen targets by 50%.

talents.name: Cold Snap
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of all spells by 4% and reduces the threat caused by your Frost spells by 4%.

talents.name: Improved Cone of Cold
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Cone of Cold spell by 35%.

talents.name: Frozen Core
talents.description: Reduces the damage taken from all spells by 6%.

talents.name: Cold as Ice
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Cold Snap, Ice Barrier and Summon Water Elemental spells by 20%.

talents.name: Winter's Chill
talents.description: Increases your chance to critically hit with Frostbolt by an additional 3% and gives your Frost damage spells a 100% chance to apply the Winter's Chill effect, which increases the chance spells will critically hit the target by 1% for 15 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

talents.name: Shattered Barrier
talents.description: Gives your Ice Barrier spell a 100% chance to freeze all enemies within 10 yds for 8 sec when it is destroyed.

talents.name: Ice Barrier
talents.description: Instantly shields you, absorbing 455 damage. Lasts 1 min. While the shield holds, spellcasting will not be delayed by damage.

talents.name: Arctic Winds
talents.description: Increases all Frost damage you cause by 5% and reduces the chance melee and ranged attacks will hit you by 5%.

talents.name: Empowered Frostbolt
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Frostbolt spell by an amount equal to 10% of your spell power and reduces the cast time by 0.2 sec.

talents.name: Fingers of Frost
talents.description: Gives your Chill effects a 15% chance to grant you the Fingers of Frost effect, which treats your next 2 spells cast as if the target were Frozen. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Brain Freeze
talents.description: Your Frost damage spells with chilling effects have a 15% chance to cause your next Fireball or Frostfire Bolt spell to be instant cast and cost no mana.

talents.name: Summon Water Elemental
talents.description: Summon a Water Elemental to fight for the caster for 45 sec.

talents.name: Enduring Winter
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Summon Water Elemental spell by 15 sec and your Frostbolt spell has a 100% chance to grant up to 10 party or raid members mana regeneration equal to 1% of their maximum mana per 5 sec for 15 sec. This effect cannot occur more often than once every 6 sec.

talents.name: Chilled to the Bone
talents.description: Increases the damage caused by your Frostbolt, Frostfire Bolt and Ice Lance spells by 5% and reduces the movement speed of all chilled targets by an additional 10%.

talents.name: Spiritual Focus
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Flash of Light and Holy Light by 70%.

talents.name: Seals of the Pure
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Seal of Righteousness, Seal of Vengeance and Seal of Corruption and their Judgement effects by 15%.

talents.name: Healing Light
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your Holy Light, Flash of Light and the effectiveness of Holy Shock spells by 12%.

talents.name: Divine Intellect
talents.description: Increases your total Intellect by 10%.

talents.name: Unyielding Faith
talents.description: Reduces the duration of all Fear and Disorient effects by 30%.

talents.name: Aura Mastery
talents.description: Causes your Concentration Aura to make all affected targets immune to Silence and Interrupt effects and improve the effect of all other auras by 100%. Lasts 6 sec.

talents.name: Illumination
talents.description: After getting a critical effect from your Flash of Light, Holy Light, or Holy Shock heal spell you have a 100% chance to gain mana equal to 30% of the base cost of the spell.

talents.name: Improved Lay on Hands
talents.description: Grants the target of your Lay on Hands spell 20% reduced physical damage taken for 15 sec. In addition, the cooldown for your Lay on Hands spell is reduced by 4 min.

talents.name: Improved Concentration Aura
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Concentration Aura by an additional 15% and while any Aura is active reduces the duration of any Silence or Interrupt effect used against an affected group member by 30%. The duration reduction does not stack with any other effects.

talents.name: Improved Blessing of Wisdom
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Blessing of Wisdom spell by 20%.

talents.name: Blessed Hands
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of Hand of Freedom, Hand of Sacrifice and Hand of Salvation by 30%, increases the effectiveness of Hand of Salvation by 100% and the effectiveness of Hand of Sacrifice by an additional 10%.

talents.name: Pure of Heart
talents.description: Reduces the duration of Curse, Disease and Poison effects by 30%.

talents.name: Divine Favor
talents.description: When activated, gives your next Flash of Light, Holy Light, or Holy Shock spell a 100% critical effect chance.

talents.name: Sanctified Light
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your Holy Light and Holy Shock spells by 6%.

talents.name: Purifying Power
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Cleanse, Purify and Consecration spells by 10% and reduces the cooldown of your Exorcism and Holy Wrath spells by 33%.

talents.name: Holy Power
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your Holy spells by 5%.

talents.name: Light's Grace
talents.description: Gives your Holy Light spell a 100% chance to reduce the cast time of your next Holy Light spell by 0.5 sec. This effect lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Holy Shock
talents.description: Blasts the target with Holy energy, causing 314 to 340 Holy damage to an enemy, or 481 to 519 healing to an ally.

talents.name: Blessed Life
talents.description: All attacks against you have a 10% chance to cause half damage.

talents.name: Sacred Cleansing
talents.description: Your Cleanse spell has a 30% chance to increase the target's resistance to Disease, Magic and Poison by 30% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Holy Guidance
talents.description: Increases your spell power by 20% of your total Intellect.

talents.name: Divine Illumination
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of all spells by 50% for 15 sec.

talents.name: Judgements of the Pure
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Seal and Judgement spells by 25%, and your Judgement spells increase your casting and melee haste by 15% for 1 min.

talents.name: Infusion of Light
talents.description: Your Holy Shock critical hits reduce the cast time of your next Flash of Light by 1.5 sec or increase the critical chance of your next Holy Light by 20%. In addition, causes your Flash of Light to heal targets with Sacred Shield for an additional 100% over 12 sec.

talents.name: Enlightened Judgements
talents.description: Increases the range of your Judgement of Light and Judgement of Wisdom spells by 30 yards and increases your chance to hit by 4%.

talents.name: Divinity
talents.description: Increases all healing done by you and all healing effects on you by 5%.

talents.name: Divine Strength
talents.description: Increases your total Strength by 15%.

talents.name: Stoicism
talents.description: Reduces the duration of all Stun effects by an additional 30% and reduces the chance your helpful spells and damage over time effects will be dispelled by an additional 30%.

talents.name: Guardian's Favor
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Hand of Protection by 2 min and increases the duration of your Hand of Freedom by 4 sec.

talents.name: Anticipation
talents.description: Increases your chance to dodge by 5%.

talents.name: Divine Sacrifice
talents.description: 30% of all damage taken by party members within 30 yards is redirected to the Paladin (up to a maximum of 40% of the Paladin's health times the number of party members). Damage which reduces the Paladin below 20% health will break the effect. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Improved Righteous Fury
talents.description: While Righteous Fury is active, all damage taken is reduced by 6%.

talents.name: Toughness
talents.description: Increases your armor value from items by 10% and reduces the duration of all movement slowing effects by 30%.

talents.name: Divine Guardian
talents.description: When Divine Sacrifice is activated, your party and raid members within 30 yards take 20% reduced damage for 6 sec. In addition, increases the duration of your Sacred Shield by 100% and the amount absorbed by 20%.

talents.name: Improved Hammer of Justice
talents.description: Decreases the cooldown of your Hammer of Justice spell by 20 sec.

talents.name: Improved Devotion Aura
talents.description: Increases the armor bonus of your Devotion Aura by 50% and increases the amount healed on any target affected by any of your Auras by 6%.

talents.name: Blessing of Sanctuary
talents.description: Places a Blessing on the friendly target, reducing damage taken from all sources by 3% for 10 min and increasing strength and stamina by 10%. In addition, when the target blocks, parries, or dodges a melee attack the target will gain 2% of maximum displayed mana. Players may only have one Blessing on them per Paladin at any one time.

talents.name: Reckoning
talents.description: Gives you a 10% chance after blocking or being hit by any damaging attack that the next 4 weapon swings within 8 sec will generate an additional attack.

talents.name: Sacred Duty
talents.description: Increases your total Stamina by 4%, reduces the cooldown of your Divine Shield and Divine Protection spells by 60 sec.

talents.name: One-Handed Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases all damage you deal when a one-handed melee weapon is equipped by 10%.

talents.name: Spiritual Attunement
talents.description: A passive ability that gives the Paladin mana when healed by other friendly targets' spells. The amount of mana gained is equal to 10% of the amount healed.

talents.name: Holy Shield
talents.description: Increases chance to block by 30% for 10 sec and deals 79 Holy damage for each attack blocked while active. Each block expends a charge. 8 charges.

talents.name: Ardent Defender
talents.description: Damage that takes you below 35% health is reduced by 20%. In addition, attacks which would otherwise kill you cause you to be healed by up to 30% of your maximum health (amount healed based on defense). This healing effect cannot occur more often than once every 2 min.

talents.name: Redoubt
talents.description: Increases your block value by 30% and damaging melee and ranged attacks against you have a 10% chance to increase your chance to block by 30%. Lasts 10 sec or 5 blocks.

talents.name: Combat Expertise
talents.description: Increases your expertise by 6, total Stamina and chance to critically hit by 6%.

talents.name: Touched by the Light
talents.description: Increases your spell power by an amount equal to 60% of your Strength and increases the amount healed by your critical heals by 30%.

talents.name: Avenger's Shield
talents.description: Hurls a holy shield at the enemy, dealing (440 + 0.07 * Spell power + 0.07 * Attack power) to (536 + 0.07 * Spell power + 0.07 * Attack power) Holy damage, Dazing them and then jumping to additional nearby enemies. Affects 3 total targets. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Guarded by the Light
talents.description: Reduces spell damage taken by 6% and gives a 100% chance to refresh the duration of your Divine Plea when you hit an enemy. In addition, your Divine Plea spell is 100% less likely to be dispelled.

talents.name: Shield of the Templar
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 3% and grants your Avenger's Shield a 100% chance to silence your targets for 3 sec.

talents.name: Judgements of the Just
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Hammer of Justice by 10 sec, increases the duration of your Seal of Justice effect by 1 sec and your Judgement spells also reduce the melee attack speed of the target by 20%.

talents.name: Deflection
talents.description: Increases your Parry chance by 5%.

talents.name: Benediction
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of all instant cast spells by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Judgements
talents.description: Decreases the cooldown of your Judgement spells by 2 sec.

talents.name: Heart of the Crusader
talents.description: In addition to the normal effect, your Judgement spells will also increase the critical strike chance of all attacks made against that target by an additional 3%.

talents.name: Improved Blessing of Might
talents.description: Increases the attack power bonus of your Blessing of Might by 25%.

talents.name: Vindication
talents.description: Gives the Paladin's damaging attacks a chance to reduce the target's attack power by 574 for 10 sec.

talents.name: Conviction
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with all spells and attacks by 5%.

talents.name: Seal of Command
talents.description: All melee attacks deal (0.36 * Mainhand weapon min damage) to (0.36 * Mainhand weapon max damage) additional Holy damage. When used with attacks or abilities that strike a single target, this additional Holy damage will strike up to 2 additional targets. Lasts 30 min. Unleashing this Seal's energy will judge an enemy, instantly causing (0.19 * Mainhand weapon min damage + 0.08 * Attack power + 0.13 * Spell power) to (0.19 * Mainhand weapon max damage + 0.08 * Attack power + 0.13 * Spell power) Holy damage.

talents.name: Pursuit of Justice
talents.description: Reduces the duration of all Disarm effects by 15% and increases movement and mounted movement speed by 15%. This does not stack with other movement speed increasing effects.

talents.name: Eye for an Eye
talents.description: All criticals against you cause 10% of the damage taken to the attacker as well. The damage caused by Eye for an Eye will not exceed 100% of the Paladin's total health.

talents.name: Sanctity of Battle
talents.description: Increases your chance to critically hit with all spells and attacks by 3% and increases the damage caused by Exorcism and Crusader Strike by 15%.

talents.name: Crusade
talents.description: Increases all damage caused by 3% and all damage caused against Humanoids, Demons, Undead and Elementals by an additional 3%.

talents.name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with two-handed melee weapons by 6%.

talents.name: Sanctified Retribution
talents.description: Increases the damage caused by Retribution Aura by 50% and all damage caused by friendly targets affected by any of your Auras is increased by 3%.

talents.name: Vengeance
talents.description: Gives you a 3% bonus to Physical and Holy damage you deal for 30 sec after dealing a critical strike from a weapon swing, spell, or ability. This effect stacks up to 3 times.

talents.name: Divine Purpose
talents.description: Reduces your chance to be hit by spells and ranged attacks by 4% and gives your Hand of Freedom spell a 100% chance to remove any Stun effects on the target.

talents.name: The Art of War
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Judgement, Crusader Strike and Divine Storm abilities by 10% and when your melee attacks critically hit your next Flash of Light or Exorcism spell becomes instant cast.

talents.name: Repentance
talents.description: Puts the enemy target in a state of meditation, incapacitating them for up to 1 min, and removing the effect of Righteous Vengeance. Any damage caused will awaken the target. Usable against Demons, Dragonkin, Giants, Humanoids and Undead.

talents.name: Judgements of the Wise
talents.description: Your damaging Judgement spells have a 100% chance to grant the Replenishment effect to up to 10 party or raid members mana regeneration equal to 1% of their maximum mana per 5 sec for 15 sec, and to immediately grant you 25% of your base mana.

talents.name: Fanaticism
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of all Judgements capable of a critical hit by 18% and reduces threat caused by all actions by 30% except when under the effects of Righteous Fury.

talents.name: Sanctified Wrath
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Hammer of Wrath by 50%, reduces the cooldown of Avenging Wrath by 60 secs and while affected by Avenging Wrath 50% of all damage caused bypasses damage reduction effects.

talents.name: Swift Retribution
talents.description: Your auras also increase casting, ranged and melee attack speeds by 3%.

talents.name: Crusader Strike
talents.description: An instant strike that causes 75% weapon damage.

talents.name: Sheath of Light
talents.description: Increases your spell power by an amount equal to 30% of your attack power and your critical healing spells heal the target for 60% of the healed amount over 12 seconds.

talents.name: Righteous Vengeance
talents.description: When your Judgement, Crusader Strike and Divine Storm spells deal a critical strike, your target will take 30% additional damage over 8 sec.

talents.name: Unbreakable Will
talents.description: Reduces the duration of Stun, Fear, and Silence effects done to you by an additional 30%.

talents.name: Twin Disciplines
talents.description: Increases the damage and healing done by your instant spells by 5%.

talents.name: Silent Resolve
talents.description: Reduces the threat generated by your Holy and Discipline spells by 20% and reduces the chance your helpful spells and damage over time effects will be dispelled by 30%.

talents.name: Improved Inner Fire
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Inner Fire spell by 45%, and increases the total number of charges by 12.

talents.name: Improved Power Word: Fortitude
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Power Word: Fortitude and Prayer of Fortitude spells by 30%, and increases your total Stamina by 4%.

talents.name: Martyrdom
talents.description: Gives you a 100% chance to gain the Focused Casting effect that lasts for 6 sec after being the victim of a melee or ranged critical strike. The Focused Casting effect reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Priest spells and decreases the duration of Interrupt effects by 20%.

talents.name: Meditation
talents.description: Allows 50% of your mana regeneration to continue while casting.

talents.name: Inner Focus
talents.description: When activated, reduces the mana cost of your next spell by 100% and increases its critical effect chance by 25% if it is capable of a critical effect.

talents.name: Improved Power Word: Shield
talents.description: Increases the damage absorbed by your Power Word: Shield by 15%.

talents.name: Absolution
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Dispel Magic, Cure Disease, Abolish Disease and Mass Dispel spells by 15%.

talents.name: Mental Agility
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your instant cast spells by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Mana Burn
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Mana Burn spell by 1 sec.

talents.name: Reflective Shield
talents.description: Causes 45% of the damage you absorb with Power Word: Shield to reflect back at the attacker. This damage causes no threat.

talents.name: Mental Strength
talents.description: Increases your total Intellect by 15%.

talents.name: Soul Warding
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Power Word: Shield ability by 4 sec, and reduces the mana cost of your Power Word: Shield by 15%.

talents.name: Focused Power
talents.description: Increases damage and healing done by your spells by 4%. In addition, your Mass Dispel cast time is reduced by 1 sec.

talents.name: Enlightenment
talents.description: Increases your total Spirit by 6% and increases your spell haste by 6%.

talents.name: Focused Will
talents.description: Increases your spell critical effect chance by 3%, and after taking a critical hit you gain the Focused Will effect, reducing all damage taken by 4% and increasing healing effects on you by 5%. Stacks up to 3 times. Lasts 8 sec.

talents.name: Power Infusion
talents.description: Infuses the target with power, increasing spell casting speed by 20% and reducing the mana cost of all spells by 20%. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Improved Flash Heal
