talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Flash Heal by 15%, and increases the critical effect chance of your Flash Heal by 10% on friendly targets at or below 50% health.

talents.name: Renewed Hope
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your Flash Heal, Greater Heal and Penance (Heal) spells by 4% on targets afflicted by the Weakened Soul effect, and you have a 100% chance to reduce all damage taken by 3% for 1 min to all friendly party and raid targets when you cast Power Word: Shield. This effect has a 2 sec cooldown.

talents.name: Rapture
talents.description: When your Power Word: Shield is completely absorbed or dispelled you are instantly energized with 2.5% of your total mana, and you have a 100% chance to energize your shielded target with 2% total mana, 8 rage, 16 energy or 32 runic power. This effect can only occur once every 12 sec.

talents.name: Aspiration
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Inner Focus, Power Infusion, Pain Suppression and Penance spells by 20%.

talents.name: Divine Aegis
talents.description: Critical heals create a protective shield on the target, absorbing 30% of the amount healed. Lasts 12 sec.

talents.name: Pain Suppression
talents.description: Instantly reduces a friendly target's threat by 5%, reduces all damage taken by 40% and increases resistance to Dispel mechanics by 65% for 8 sec.

talents.name: Grace
talents.description: Your Flash Heal, Greater Heal, and Penance spells have a 100% chance to bless the target with Grace, increasing all healing received from the Priest by 3%. This effect will stack up to 3 times. Effect lasts 15 sec. Grace can only be active on one target at a time.

talents.name: Borrowed Time
talents.description: Grants 25% spell haste for your next spell after casting Power Word: Shield, and increases the amount absorbed by your Power Word: Shield equal to 40% of your spell power.

talents.name: Healing Focus
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting any healing spell by 70%.

talents.name: Improved Renew
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your Renew spell by 15%.

talents.name: Holy Specialization
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your Holy spells by 5%.

talents.name: Spell Warding
talents.description: Reduces all spell damage taken by 10%.

talents.name: Divine Fury
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Smite, Holy Fire, Heal and Greater Heal spells by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Desperate Prayer
talents.description: Instantly heals the caster for 263 to 325.

talents.name: Blessed Recovery
talents.description: After being struck by a melee or ranged critical hit, Blessed Recovery heals you for 5% of the damage taken over 6 sec. Additional critical hits taken during the effect increase the healing received.

talents.name: Inspiration
talents.description: Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 10% for 15 sec after getting a critical effect from your Flash Heal, Heal, Greater Heal, Binding Heal, Penance, Prayer of Mending, Prayer of Healing, or Circle of Healing spell.

talents.name: Holy Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Smite and Holy Fire spells and the radius of your Prayer of Healing, Holy Nova, Divine Hymn and Circle of Healing spells by 20%.

talents.name: Improved Healing
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Lesser Heal, Heal, Greater Heal, Divine Hymn and Penance spells by 15%.

talents.name: Searing Light
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Smite, Holy Fire, Holy Nova and Penance spells by 10%.

talents.name: Healing Prayers
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Prayer of Healing and Prayer of Mending spell by 20%.

talents.name: Spirit of Redemption
talents.description: Increases total Spirit by 5% and upon death, the priest becomes the Spirit of Redemption for 15 sec. The Spirit of Redemption cannot move, attack, be attacked or targeted by any spells or effects. While in this form the priest can cast any healing spell free of cost. When the effect ends, the priest dies.

talents.name: Spiritual Guidance
talents.description: Increases spell power by 25% of your total Spirit.

talents.name: Surge of Light
talents.description: Your spell criticals have a 50% chance to cause your next Smite or Flash Heal spell to be instant cast, cost no mana but be incapable of a critical hit. This effect lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Spiritual Healing
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your healing spells by 10%.

talents.name: Holy Concentration
talents.description: Your mana regeneration from spirit is increased by 50% for 8 sec after you critically heal with Flash Heal, Greater Heal, Binding Heal or Empowered Renew.

talents.name: Lightwell
talents.description: Creates a Holy Lightwell. Friendly players can click the Lightwell to restore (267 * 3 *) health over 6 sec. Attacks done to you equal to 30% of your total health will cancel the effect. Lightwell lasts for 3 min or 10 charges.

talents.name: Blessed Resilience
talents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your healing spells by 3%, and critical hits made against you have a 60% chance to prevent you from being critically hit again for 6 sec.

talents.name: Body and Soul
talents.description: When you cast Power Word: Shield, you increase the target's movement speed by 60% for 4 sec, and you have a 100% chance when you cast Abolish Disease on yourself to also cleanse 1 poison effect in addition to diseases.

talents.name: Empowered Healing
talents.description: Your Greater Heal spell gains an additional 40% and your Flash Heal and Binding Heal gain an additional 20% of your bonus healing effects.

talents.name: Serendipity
talents.description: When you heal with Binding Heal or Flash Heal, the cast time of your next Greater Heal or Prayer of Healing spell is reduced by 12%. Stacks up to 3 times. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Empowered Renew
talents.description: Your Renew spell gains an additional 15% of your bonus healing effects, and your Renew will instantly heal the target for 15% of the total periodic effect.

talents.name: Circle of Healing
talents.description: Heals up to 5 friendly party or raid members within 15 yards of the target for 347 to 383.

talents.name: Test of Faith
talents.description: Increases healing by 12% on friendly targets at or below 50% health.

talents.name: Divine Providence
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by Circle of Healing, Binding Heal, Holy Nova, Prayer of Healing, Divine Hymn and Prayer of Mending by 10%, and reduces the cooldown of your Prayer of Mending by 30%.

talents.name: Spirit Tap
talents.description: Gives you a 100% chance to gain a 100% bonus to your Spirit after killing a target that yields experience or honor. For the duration, your mana will regenerate at a 83% rate while casting. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Improved Spirit Tap
talents.description: Your Mind Blast and Shadow Word: Death critical strikes have a 100% chance and your Mind Flay critical strikes have a 50% chance to increase your total Spirit by 10%. For the duration, your mana will regenerate at a 33% rate while casting. Lasts 8 sec.

talents.name: Darkness
talents.description: Increases your Shadow spell damage by 10%.

talents.name: Shadow Affinity
talents.description: Reduces the threat generated by your Shadow spells by 25%, and you receive 15% of your base mana when your Shadow Word: Pain or Vampiric Touch spells are dispelled.

talents.name: Improved Shadow Word: Pain
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Shadow Word: Pain spell by 6%.

talents.name: Shadow Focus
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with your Shadow spells by 3%, and reduces the mana cost of your Shadow spells by 6%.

talents.name: Improved Psychic Scream
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Psychic Scream spell by 4 sec.

talents.name: Improved Mind Blast
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Mind Blast spell by 2.5 sec., and while in Shadowform your Mind Blast also has a 100% chance to reduce all healing done to the target by 20% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Mind Flay
talents.description: Assault the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing 45 Shadow damage over 3 sec and slowing their movement speed by 50%.

talents.name: Veiled Shadows
talents.description: Decreases the cooldown of your Fade ability by 6 sec, and reduces the cooldown of your Shadowfiend ability by 2 minutes.

talents.name: Shadow Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your offensive Shadow spells by 20%.

talents.name: Shadow Weaving
talents.description: Your Shadow damage spells have a 100% chance to increase the Shadow damage you deal by 2% for 15 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

talents.name: Silence
talents.description: Silences the target, preventing them from casting spells for 5 sec. Non-player victim spellcasting is also interrupted for 3 sec.

talents.name: Vampiric Embrace
talents.description: Fills you with the embrace of Shadow energy, causing you to be healed for 15% and other party members to be healed for 3% of any single-target Shadow spell damage you deal for 30 min.

talents.name: Improved Vampiric Embrace
talents.description: Increases the healing received from Vampiric Embrace by 67%.

talents.name: Focused Mind
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Mind Blast, Mind Control, Mind Flay and Mind Sear spells by 15%.

talents.name: Mind Melt
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Mind Blast, Mind Flay and Mind Sear spells by 4%, and increases the periodic critical strike chance of your Vampiric Touch, Devouring Plague and Shadow Word: Pain spells by 6%.

talents.name: Improved Devouring Plague
talents.description: Increases the periodic damage done by your Devouring Plague by 15%, and when you cast Devouring Plague you instantly deal damage equal to 30% of its total periodic effect.

talents.name: Shadowform
talents.description: Assume a Shadowform, increasing your Shadow damage by 15%, reducing all damage done to you by 15% and threat generated by 30%. However, you may not cast Holy spells while in this form except Cure Disease and Abolish Disease. Grants the periodic damage from your Shadow Word: Pain, Devouring Plague, and Vampiric Touch spells the ability to critically hit for 100% increased damage and grants Devouring Plague and Vampiric Touch the ability to benefit from haste.

talents.name: Shadow Power
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Mind Blast, Mind Flay, and Shadow Word: Death spells by 100%.

talents.name: Improved Shadowform
talents.description: Your Fade ability now has a 100% chance to remove all movement impairing effects when used while in Shadowform, and reduces casting or channeling time lost when damaged by 70% when casting any Shadow spell while in Shadowform.

talents.name: Misery
talents.description: Your Shadow Word: Pain, Mind Flay and Vampiric Touch spells also increase the chance for harmful spells to hit by 3% lasting 24 sec, and increases the benefit from spell power gained by your Mind Blast, Mind Flay and Mind Sear spells by 15%.

talents.name: Psychic Horror
talents.description: You terrify the target, causing them to tremble in horror for 3 sec and drop their main hand and ranged weapons for 10 sec.

talents.name: Vampiric Touch
talents.description: Causes 450 Shadow damage over 15 sec to your target and causes up to 10 party or raid members to gain 1% of their maximum mana per 5 sec when you deal damage from Mind Blast. In addition, if the Vampiric Touch is dispelled it will cause 720 damage to the afflicted target.

talents.name: Pain and Suffering
talents.description: Your Mind Flay has a 100% chance to refresh the duration of your Shadow Word: Pain on the target, and reduces the damage you take from your own Shadow Word: Death by 30%.

talents.name: Twisted Faith
talents.description: Increases your spell power by 20% of your total Spirit, and your damage done by your Mind Flay and Mind Blast is increased by 10% if your target is afflicted by your Shadow Word: Pain.

talents.name: Improved Eviscerate
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Eviscerate ability by 20%.

talents.name: Remorseless Attacks
talents.description: After killing an opponent that yields experience or honor, gives you a 40% increased critical strike chance on your next Sinister Strike, Hemorrhage, Backstab, Mutilate, Ambush, or Ghostly Strike. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Malice
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 5%.

talents.name: Ruthlessness
talents.description: Gives your melee finishing moves a 60% chance to add a combo point to your target.

talents.name: Blood Spatter
talents.description: Increases the damage caused by your Garrote and Rupture abilities by 30%.

talents.name: Puncturing Wounds
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Backstab ability by 30%, and the critical strike chance of your Mutilate ability by 15%.

talents.name: Vigor
talents.description: Increases your maximum Energy by 10.

talents.name: Improved Expose Armor
talents.description: Reduces the energy cost of your Expose Armor ability by 10.

talents.name: Lethality
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of all combo point-generating abilities that do not require stealth by 30%.

talents.name: Vile Poisons
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt by your poisons and Envenom ability by 20% and gives your damage over time poisons an additional 30% chance to resist dispel effects.

talents.name: Improved Poisons
talents.description: Increases the chance to apply Deadly Poison to your target by 20% and the frequency of applying Instant Poison to your target by 50%.

talents.name: Fleet Footed
talents.description: Reduces the duration of all movement impairing effects by 30% and increases your movement speed by 15%. This does not stack with other movement speed increasing effects.

talents.name: Cold Blood
talents.description: When activated, increases the critical strike chance of your next offensive ability by 100%.

talents.name: Improved Kidney Shot
talents.description: While affected by your Kidney Shot ability, the target receives an additional 9% damage from all sources.

talents.name: Quick Recovery
talents.description: All healing effects on you are increased by 20%. In addition, your finishing moves refund 80% of their Energy cost when they fail to hit.

talents.name: Seal Fate
talents.description: Your critical strikes from abilities that add combo points have a 100% chance to add an additional combo point.

talents.name: Murder
talents.description: Increases all damage caused by 4%.

talents.name: Deadly Brew
talents.description: When you apply Instant, Wound or Mind-Numbing poison to a target, you have a 100% chance to apply Crippling poison.

talents.name: Overkill
talents.description: While stealthed, and for 20 seconds after breaking stealth, you regenerate 30% additional energy.

talents.name: Deadened Nerves
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 6%.

talents.name: Focused Attacks
talents.description: Your melee critical strikes have a 100% chance to give you 2 energy.

talents.name: Find Weakness
talents.description: Offensive ability damage increased by 6%.

talents.name: Master Poisoner
talents.description: Increases the critical hit chance of all attacks made against any target you have poisoned by 3%, reduces the duration of all Poison effects applied to you by 50%, and gives Envenom a 100% chance not to consume Deadly Poison.

talents.name: Mutilate
talents.description: Instantly attacks with both weapons for % weapon damage plus an additional 44 with each weapon. Damage is increased by 20% against Poisoned targets. Awards 2 combo points.

talents.name: Turn the Tables
talents.description: Whenever anyone in your party or raid blocks, dodges, or parries an attack your chance to critically hit with all combo moves is increased by 6% for 8 sec.

talents.name: Cut to the Chase
talents.description: Your Eviscerate and Envenom abilities have a 100% chance to refresh your Slice and Dice duration to its 5 combo point maximum.

talents.name: Improved Gouge
talents.description: Increases the effect duration of your Gouge ability by 1.5 sec.

talents.name: Improved Sinister Strike
talents.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Sinister Strike ability by 5.

talents.name: Dual Wield Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your offhand weapon by 50%.

talents.name: Improved Slice and Dice
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Slice and Dice ability by 50%.

talents.name: Deflection
talents.description: Increases your Parry chance by 6%.

talents.name: Precision
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with weapon and poison attacks by 5%.

talents.name: Endurance
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Sprint and Evasion abilities by 60 sec and increases your total Stamina by 4%.

talents.name: Riposte
talents.description: A strike that becomes active after parrying an opponent's attack. This attack deals 150% weapon damage and slows their melee attack speed by 20% for 30 sec. Awards 1 combo point.

talents.name: Close Quarters Combat
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with Daggers and Fist Weapons by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Kick
talents.description: Gives your Kick ability a 100% chance to silence the target for 2 sec.

talents.name: Improved Sprint
talents.description: Gives a 100% chance to remove all Movement Impairing effects when you activate your Sprint ability.

talents.name: Lightning Reflexes
talents.description: Increases your Dodge chance by 6% and gives you 10% melee haste.

talents.name: Aggression
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Sinister Strike, Backstab, and Eviscerate abilities by 15%.

talents.name: Mace Specialization
talents.description: Your attacks with maces ignore up to 15% of your opponent's armor.

talents.name: Blade Flurry
talents.description: Increases your attack speed by 20%. In addition, attacks strike an additional nearby opponent. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Hack and Slash
talents.description: Gives you a 5% chance to get an extra attack on the same target after hitting your target with your Sword or Axe.

talents.name: Weapon Expertise
talents.description: Increases your expertise by 10.

talents.name: Blade Twisting
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt by Sinister Strike and Backstab by 10%, and your damaging melee attacks have a 10% chance to Daze the target for 8 sec.

talents.name: Vitality
talents.description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 25%.

talents.name: Adrenaline Rush
talents.description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 100% for 15 sec.

talents.name: Nerves of Steel
talents.description: Reduces damage taken while affected by Stun and Fear effects by 30%.

talents.name: Throwing Specialization
talents.description: Increases the range of Throw and Deadly Throw by 4 yards and gives your Deadly Throw a 100% chance to interrupt the target for 3 sec.

talents.name: Combat Potency
talents.description: Gives your successful off-hand melee attacks a 20% chance to generate 15 Energy.

talents.name: Unfair Advantage
talents.description: Whenever you dodge an attack you gain an Unfair Advantage, striking back for 100% of your main hand weapon's damage. This cannot occur more than once per second.

talents.name: Surprise Attacks
talents.description: Your finishing moves can no longer be dodged, and the damage dealt by your Sinister Strike, Backstab, Shiv, Hemorrhage and Gouge abilities is increased by 10%.

talents.name: Savage Combat
talents.description: Increases your total attack power by 4% and all physical damage caused to enemies you have poisoned is increased by 4%.

talents.name: Prey on the Weak
talents.description: Your critical strike damage is increased by 20% when the target has less health than you (as a percentage of total health).

talents.name: Relentless Strikes
talents.description: Your finishing moves have a 20% chance per combo point to restore 25 energy.

talents.name: Master of Deception
talents.description: Reduces the chance enemies have to detect you while in Stealth mode. More effective than Master of Deception (Rank 2).

talents.name: Opportunity
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt with your Backstab, Mutilate, Garrote and Ambush abilities by 20%.

talents.name: Sleight of Hand
talents.description: Reduces the chance you are critically hit by melee and ranged attacks by 2% and increases the threat reduction of your Feint ability by 20%.

talents.name: Dirty Tricks
talents.description: Increases the range of your Blind and Sap abilities by 5 yards and reduces the energy cost of your Blind and Sap abilities by 50%.

talents.name: Camouflage
talents.description: Increases your speed while stealthed by 15% and reduces the cooldown of your Stealth ability by 6 sec.

talents.name: Elusiveness
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Vanish and Blind abilities by 60 sec and your Cloak of Shadows ability by 30 sec.

talents.name: Ghostly Strike
talents.description: A strike that deals 125% weapon damage (180% if a dagger is equipped) and increases your chance to dodge by 15% for 7 sec. Awards 1 combo point.

talents.name: Serrated Blades
talents.description: Causes your attacks to ignore up to 9% of your target's Armor and increases the damage dealt by your Rupture ability by 30%.

talents.name: Setup
talents.description: Gives you a 100% chance to add a combo point to your target after dodging their attack or fully resisting one of their spells. This cannot happen more than once per second.

talents.name: Initiative
talents.description: Gives you a 100% chance to add an additional combo point to your target when using your Ambush, Garrote, or Cheap Shot ability.

talents.name: Improved Ambush
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Ambush ability by 50%.

talents.name: Heightened Senses
talents.description: Increases your Stealth detection and reduces the chance you are hit by spells and ranged attacks by 4%. More effective than Heightened Senses (Rank 1).

talents.name: Preparation
talents.description: When activated, this ability immediately finishes the cooldown on your Evasion, Sprint, Vanish, Cold Blood and Shadowstep abilities.

talents.name: Dirty Deeds
talents.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Cheap Shot and Garrote abilities by 20. Additionally, your special abilities cause 20% more damage against targets below 35% health.

talents.name: Hemorrhage
talents.description: An instant strike that deals 110% weapon damage (160% if a dagger is equipped) and causes the target to hemorrhage, increasing any Physical damage dealt to the target by up to. Lasts 10 charges or 15 sec. Awards 1 combo point.

talents.name: Master of Subtlety
talents.description: Attacks made while stealthed and for 6 seconds after breaking stealth cause an additional 10% damage.

talents.name: Deadliness
talents.description: Increases your attack power by 10%.

talents.name: Enveloping Shadows
talents.description: Reduces the damage taken by area of effect attacks by 30%.

talents.name: Premeditation
talents.description: When used, adds 2 combo points to your target. You must add to or use those combo points within 20 sec or the combo points are lost.

talents.name: Cheat Death
talents.description: You have a 100% chance that an attack which would otherwise kill you will instead reduce you to 10% of your maximum health. In addition, all damage taken will be reduced by up to 90% for 3 sec (modified by resilience). This effect cannot occur more than once per minute.

talents.name: Sinister Calling
talents.description: Increases your total Agility by 15% and increases the percentage damage bonus of Backstab and Hemorrhage by an additional 10%.

talents.name: Waylay
talents.description: Your Ambush and Backstab hits have a 100% chance to unbalance a target, increasing the time between their melee and ranged attacks by 20%, and reducing movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.

talents.name: Honor Among Thieves
talents.description: When anyone in your group critically hits with a damage or healing spell or ability, you have a 100% chance to gain a combo point on your current target. This effect cannot occur more than once every second.

talents.name: Shadowstep
talents.description: Attempts to step through the shadows and reappear behind your enemy and increases movement speed by 70% for 3 sec. The damage of your next ability is increased by 20% and the threat caused is reduced by 50%. Lasts 10 sec.

talents.name: Filthy Tricks
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown by 10 sec and energy cost by 10 of your Tricks of the Trade, Distract and Shadowstep abilities and reduces the cooldown of Preparation by 3 min.

talents.name: Slaughter from the Shadows
talents.description: Reduces the energy cost of your Backstab and Ambush abilities by 20 and the energy cost of your Hemorrhage by 5, and increases all damage done by 5%.

talents.name: Convection
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Shock, Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Lava Burst, and Wind Shear spells by 10%.

talents.name: Concussion
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Thunderstorm, Lava Burst and Shock spells by 5%.

talents.name: Call of Flame
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire Totems and Fire Nova by 15%, and damage done by your Lava Burst spell by 6%.

talents.name: Elemental Warding
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 6%.

talents.name: Elemental Devastation
talents.description: Your non-periodic offensive spell crits will increase your chance to get a critical strike with melee attacks by 9% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Reverberation
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Shock spells and Wind Shear by 1 sec.

talents.name: Elemental Focus
talents.description: After landing a non-periodic critical strike with a Fire, Frost, or Nature damage spell, you enter a Clearcasting state. The Clearcasting state reduces the mana cost of your next 2 damage or healing spells by 40%.

talents.name: Elemental Fury
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Searing and Magma Totems and your Fire, Frost, and Nature spells by 100%.

talents.name: Improved Fire Nova
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire Nova by 20% and reduces the cooldown by 4 sec.

talents.name: Eye of the Storm
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Lava Burst and Hex spells by 70%.

talents.name: Elemental Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Fire Nova, and Lava Burst spells by 6 yards, increases the radius of your Thunderstorm spell by 20%, and increases the range of your Flame Shock by 15 yards.

talents.name: Call of Thunder
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning and Thunderstorm spells by an additional 5%.

talents.name: Unrelenting Storm
talents.description: Regenerate mana equal to 12% of your Intellect every 5 sec, even while casting.

talents.name: Elemental Precision
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with Fire, Frost and Nature spells by 3% and reduces the threat caused by Fire, Frost and Nature spells by 30%.

talents.name: Lightning Mastery
talents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, and Lava Burst spells by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Elemental Mastery
talents.description: When activated, your next Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning or Lava Burst spell becomes an instant cast spell. In addition, you gain 15% spell haste for 15 sec. Elemental Mastery shares a cooldown with Nature's Swiftness.

talents.name: Storm, Earth and Fire
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Chain Lightning spell by 2.5 sec, your Earthbind Totem also has a 100% chance to root targets for 5 sec when cast and the periodic damage done by your Flame Shock is increased by 60%.

talents.name: Booming Echoes
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Flame Shock and Frost Shock spells by an additional 2 sec., and increases the direct damage done by your Flame Shock and Frost Shock spells by an additional 20%.

talents.name: Elemental Oath
talents.description: While Clearcasting from Elemental Focus is active, you deal 10% more spell damage. In addition, party and raid members within 100 yards receive a 5% bonus to their spell critical strike chance.

talents.name: Lightning Overload
talents.description: Gives your Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning spells a 33% chance to cast a second, similar spell on the same target at no additional cost that causes half damage and no threat.

talents.name: Astral Shift
talents.description: When stunned, feared or silenced you shift into the Astral Plane reducing all damage taken by 30% for the duration of the stun, fear or silence effect.

talents.name: Totem of Wrath
talents.description: Summons a Totem of Wrath with 5 health at the feet of the caster. The totem increases spell power by 100 for all party and raid members, and increases the critical strike chance of all attacks by 3% against all enemies within 40 yards. Lasts 5 min.

talents.name: Lava Flows
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Lava Burst spell by an additional 24%, and when your Flame Shock is dispelled your spell casting speed is increased by 30% for 6 sec.

talents.name: Shamanism
talents.description: Your Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning spells gain an additional 20% and your Lava Burst gains an additional 25% of your bonus damage effects.

talents.name: Enhancing Totems
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Strength of Earth and Flametongue Totems by 15%.

talents.name: Earth's Grasp
talents.description: Increases the health of your Stoneclaw Totem by 50% and the radius of your Earthbind Totem by 20%, and reduces the cooldown of both totems by 30%.

talents.name: Ancestral Knowledge
talents.description: Increases your Intellect by 10%.

talents.name: Guardian Totems
talents.description: Increases the amount of armor increased by your Stoneskin Totem by 20% and reduces the cooldown of your Grounding Totem by 2 sec.

talents.name: Thundering Strikes
talents.description: Improves your chance to get a critical strike with all spells and attacks by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Ghost Wolf
talents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Ghost Wolf spell by 2 sec.

talents.name: Improved Shields
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Lightning Shield orbs by 15%, increases the amount of mana gained from your Water Shield orbs by 15% and increases the amount of healing done by your Earth Shield orbs by 15%.

talents.name: Elemental Weapons
talents.description: Increases the damage caused by your Windfury Weapon effect by 40% increases the spell damage on your Flametongue Weapon by 30% and increases the bonus healing on your Earthliving Weapon by 30%.

talents.name: Shamanistic Focus
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your Shock spells by 45%.

talents.name: Anticipation
talents.description: Increases your chance to dodge by an additional 3%, and reduces the duration of all Disarm effects used against you by 50%. This does not stack with other Disarm duration reducing effects.

talents.name: Flurry
talents.description: Increases your attack speed by 30% for your next 3 swings after dealing a critical strike.

talents.name: Toughness
talents.description: Increases your Stamina by 10%, and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects on you by 30%.

talents.name: Improved Windfury Totem
talents.description: Increases the melee haste granted by your Windfury totem by 4%.

talents.name: Spirit Weapons
talents.description: Gives a chance to parry enemy melee attacks and reduces all threat generated by 30%.

talents.name: Mental Dexterity
talents.description: Increases your Attack Power by 100% of your Intellect.

talents.name: Unleashed Rage
talents.description: Increases your expertise by 9, and increases all party and raid members' attack power by 10% while within 100 yards of the Shaman.

talents.name: Weapon Mastery
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with all weapons by 10%.

talents.name: Frozen Power
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Lava Lash and Shock spells by 10% on targets afflicted by your Frostbrand Attack effect, and your Frost Shock has a 100% chance to root the target in ice for 5 sec. when used on targets at or further than 15 yards from you.

talents.name: Dual Wield Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit while dual wielding by an additional 6%.

talents.name: Dual Wield
talents.description: Allows one-hand and off-hand weapons to be equipped in the off-hand.

talents.name: Stormstrike
talents.description: Instantly attack with both weapons. In addition, the next 4 sources of Nature damage dealt to the target from the Shaman are increased by 20%. Lasts 12 sec.

talents.name: Static Shock
talents.description: You have a 6% chance to hit your target with a Lightning Shield orb charge when you deal damage with melee attacks and abilities, and your Lightning Shield gains 6 additional charges.

talents.name: Lava Lash
talents.description: You charge your off-hand weapon with lava, instantly dealing 100% off-hand Weapon damage. Damage is increased by 25% if your off-hand weapon is enchanted with Flametongue.

talents.name: Improved Stormstrike
talents.description: When you Stormstrike, you have a 100% chance to immediately grant you 20% of your base mana.

talents.name: Mental Quickness
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your instant cast Shaman spells by 6% and increases your spell power by an amount equal to 30% of your attack power.

talents.name: Shamanistic Rage
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 30% and gives your successful melee attacks a chance to regenerate mana equal to 15% of your attack power. This spell is usable while stunned. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Earthen Power
talents.description: Your Earthbind Totem's pulses have a 100% chance to also remove all snare effects from you and nearby friendly targets, and your Earth Shock reduces enemy attack speed by an additional 10%.

talents.name: Maelstrom Weapon
talents.description: When you deal damage with a melee weapon, you have a chance (higher than rank 4) to reduce the cast time of your next Lightning Bolt, Chain Lightning, Lesser Healing Wave, Healing Wave, Chain Heal, or Hex spell by 20%. Stacks up to 5 times. Lasts 30 sec.

talents.name: Improved Healing Wave
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Healing Wave spell by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Totemic Focus
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your totems by 25%.

talents.name: Improved Reincarnation
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Reincarnation spell by 15 min and increases the amount of health and mana recovered when reincarnating by an additional 20%.

talents.name: Healing Grace
talents.description: Reduces the threat generated by your healing spells by 15% and reduces the chance your helpful spells and damage over time effects will be dispelled by 30%.

talents.name: Tidal Focus
talents.description: Reduces the mana cost of your healing spells by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Water Shield
talents.description: You have a 100% chance to instantly gain mana as if you consumed a Water Shield Orb when you gain a critical effect from your Healing Wave or Riptide spells, a 60% chance when you gain a critical effect from your Lesser Healing Wave spell, and a 30% chance when you gain a critical effect from your Chain Heal spell.

talents.name: Healing Focus
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting any Shaman healing spell by 70%.

talents.name: Tidal Force
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your Healing Wave, Lesser Healing Wave and Chain Heal by 60%. Each critical heal reduces the chance by 20%. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Ancestral Healing
talents.description: Reduces your target's physical damage taken by 10% for 15 sec after getting a critical effect from one of your healing spells.

talents.name: Restorative Totems
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Mana Spring Totem by 20%, and increases the amount healed by your Healing Stream Totem by 45%.

talents.name: Tidal Mastery
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your healing and lightning spells by 5%.

talents.name: Healing Way
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your Healing Wave spell by 25%.

talents.name: Nature's Swiftness
talents.description: When activated, your next Nature spell with a base casting time less than 10 sec. becomes an instant cast spell. Nature's Swiftness shares a cooldown with Elemental Mastery.

talents.name: Focused Mind
talents.description: Reduces the duration of any Silence or Interrupt effects used against the Shaman by 30%. This effect does not stack with other similar effects.

talents.name: Purification
talents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your healing spells by 10%.

talents.name: Nature's Guardian
talents.description: Whenever a damaging attack brings you below 30% health, your maximum health is increased by 15% for 10 sec and your threat level towards the attacker is reduced. 30 second cooldown.

talents.name: Mana Tide Totem
talents.description: Summons a Mana Tide Totem with 10% of the caster's health at the feet of the caster for 12 sec that restores % of total mana every 3 seconds to group members within 30 yards.

talents.name: Cleanse Spirit
talents.description: Cleanse the spirit of a friendly target, removing 1 poison effect, 1 disease effect, and 1 curse effect.

talents.name: Blessing of the Eternals
talents.description: Increases the critical effect chance of your spells by 4%, and increases the chance to apply the Earthliving heal over time effect on the target by 80% when they are at or under 35% total health.

talents.name: Improved Chain Heal
talents.description: Increases the amount healed by your Chain Heal spell by 20%.

talents.name: Nature's Blessing
talents.description: Increases your healing by an amount equal to 15% of your Intellect.

talents.name: Ancestral Awakening
talents.description: When you critically heal with your Healing Wave, Lesser Healing Wave or Riptide you summon an Ancestral spirit to aid you, instantly healing the lowest percentage health friendly party or raid target within 40 yards for 30% of the amount healed.

talents.name: Earth Shield
talents.description: Protects the target with an earthen shield, reducing casting or channeling time lost when damaged by 30% and causing attacks to heal the shielded target for . This effect can only occur once every few seconds. 6 charges. Lasts 10 min. Earth Shield can only be placed on one target at a time and only one Elemental Shield can be active on a target at a time.

talents.name: Improved Earth Shield
talents.description: Increases the amount of charges for your Earth Shield by 2, and increases the healing done by your Earth Shield by 10%.

talents.name: Tidal Waves
talents.description: When you cast Chain Heal or Riptide, you have a 100% chance to lower the cast time of your Healing Wave spell by 30% and increase the critical effect chance of your Lesser Healing Wave spell by 25%, until two such spells have been cast. In addition, your Healing Wave gains an additional 20% of your bonus healing effects and your Lesser Healing Wave gains an additional 10% of your bonus healing effects.

talents.name: Improved Curse of Agony
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Curse of Agony by 10%.

talents.name: Suppression
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with spells by 3%, and reduces the mana cost of your Affliction spells by 6%.

talents.name: Improved Corruption
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Corruption by 10%, and increases the critical strike chance of your Seed of Corruption by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Curse of Weakness
talents.description: Increases the amount of attack power reduced by your Curse of Weakness by 20%.

talents.name: Improved Drain Soul
talents.description: Returns 15% of your maximum mana if the target is killed by you while you drain its soul. In addition, your Affliction spells generate 20% less threat.

talents.name: Improved Life Tap
talents.description: Increases the amount of Mana awarded by your Life Tap spell by 20%.

talents.name: Soul Siphon
talents.description: Increases the amount drained by your Drain Life and Drain Soul spells by an additional 6% for each of your Affliction effects on the target, up to a maximum of 18% additional effect.

talents.name: Improved Fear
talents.description: Causes your Fear spell to inflict a Nightmare on the target when the fear effect ends. The Nightmare effect reduces the target's movement speed by 30% for 5 sec.

talents.name: Fel Concentration
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting Drain Life, Drain Mana, Drain Soul, Unstable Affliction, and Haunt by 70%.

talents.name: Amplify Curse
talents.description: Reduces the global cooldown of your Curses by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Grim Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Affliction spells by 20%.

talents.name: Nightfall
talents.description: Gives your Corruption and Drain Life spells a 4% chance to cause you to enter a Shadow Trance state after damaging the opponent. The Shadow Trance state reduces the casting time of your next Shadow Bolt spell by 100%.

talents.name: Empowered Corruption
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Corruption spell by an amount equal to 36% of your spell power.

talents.name: Shadow Embrace
talents.description: Your Shadow Bolt and Haunt spells apply the Shadow Embrace effect, increasing all shadow periodic damage dealt to the target by you by 5%, and reduces all periodic healing done to the target by 10%. Lasts for 12 sec. Stacks up to 3 times.

talents.name: Siphon Life
talents.description: When you deal damage with your Corruption spell, you are instantly healed for % of the damage done. In addition, the damage done by your Corruption, Seed of Corruption and Unstable Affliction damage over time effects is increased by 5%.

talents.name: Curse of Exhaustion
talents.description: Reduces the target's movement speed by 30% for 12 sec. Only one Curse per Warlock can be active on any one target.

talents.name: Improved Felhunter
talents.description: Your Felhunter regains 8% of its maximum mana each time it hits with its Shadow Bite ability and the cooldown on that ability is reduced by 4 sec. In addition, increases the effect of your Felhunter's Fel Intelligence by 10%.

talents.name: Shadow Mastery
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt or life drained by your Shadow spells and your Felhunter's Shadow Bite ability by 15%.

talents.name: Eradication
talents.description: When you deal damage with Corruption, you have 6% chance to increase your spell casting speed by 20% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Contagion
talents.description: Increases the damage of Curse of Agony, Corruption and Seed of Corruption by 5% and reduces the chance your helpful Affliction spells and damage over time effects will be dispelled by an additional 30%.

talents.name: Dark Pact
talents.description: Drains 305 of your summoned demon's Mana, returning 100% to you.

talents.name: Improved Howl of Terror
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Howl of Terror spell by 1.5 sec.

talents.name: Malediction
talents.description: Increases your spell damage by 3%, and increases the periodic critical strike chance of your Corruption and Unstable Affliction spells by 9%.

talents.name: Death's Embrace
talents.description: Increases the amount drained by your Drain Life by 30% while your health is at or below 20% health, and increases the damage done by your Shadow spells by 12% when your target is at or below 35% health.

talents.name: Unstable Affliction
talents.description: Shadow energy slowly destroys the target, causing 550 damage over 15 sec. In addition, if the Unstable Affliction is dispelled it will cause 990 damage to the dispeller and silence them for 5 sec. Only one Unstable Affliction or Immolate per Warlock can be active on any one target.

talents.name: Pandemic
talents.description: Grants the periodic damage from your Corruption and Unstable Affliction spells the ability to critically hit for 100% increased damage, and increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Haunt spell by 100%.

talents.name: Everlasting Affliction
talents.description: Your Corruption and Unstable Affliction spells gain an additional 5% of your bonus spell damage, and your Drain Life, Drain Soul, Shadow Bolt, and Haunt spells have a 100% chance to reset the duration of your Corruption spell on the target.

talents.name: Improved Healthstone
talents.description: Increases the amount of Health restored by your Healthstone by 20%.

talents.name: Improved Imp
talents.description: Increases the effect of your Imp's Firebolt, Fire Shield, and Blood Pact spells by 30%.

talents.name: Demonic Embrace
talents.description: Increases your total Stamina by 10%.

talents.name: Fel Synergy
talents.description: You have a 100% chance to heal your pet for 15% of the amount of spell damage done by you.

talents.name: Improved Health Funnel
talents.description: Increases the amount of Health transferred by your Health Funnel spell by 20% and reduces the health cost by 20%. In addition, your summoned Demon takes 30% less damage while under the effect of your Health Funnel.

talents.name: Demonic Brutality
talents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Voidwalker's Torment, Consume Shadows, Sacrifice and Suffering spells by 10%, and increases the attack power bonus on your Felguard's Demonic Frenzy effect by 1%.

talents.name: Fel Vitality
talents.description: Increases the Stamina and Intellect of your Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Felhunter and Felguard by 15% and increases your maximum health and mana by 3%.

talents.name: Improved Sayaad
talents.description: Reduces the cast time of your Succubus' Seduction by 66%, and increases the duration of your Succubus' Seduction and Lesser Invisibility spells by 30%.

talents.name: Soul Link
talents.description: When active, 20% of all damage taken by the caster is taken by your Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Felhunter, Felguard, or subjugated demon instead. That damage cannot be prevented. Lasts as long as the demon is active and controlled.

talents.name: Fel Domination
talents.description: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter or Felguard Summon spell has its casting time reduced by 5.5 sec and its Mana cost reduced by 50%.

talents.name: Demonic Aegis
talents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Demon Armor and Fel Armor spells by 30%.

talents.name: Unholy Power
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter and Felguard's melee attacks and your Imp's Firebolt by 20%.

talents.name: Master Summoner
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Imp, Voidwalker, Succubus, Incubus, Felhunter and Fel Guard Summoning spells by 4 sec and the Mana cost by 40%.

talents.name: Mana Feed
talents.description: When you gain mana from Drain Mana or Life Tap spells, your summoned demon gains 100% of the mana you gain.

talents.name: Master Conjuror
talents.description: Increases the combat ratings gained from your conjured Firestone and Spellstone by 300%.

talents.name: Master Demonologist
talents.description: Grants both the Warlock and the summoned demon an effect as long as that demon is active. Imp - Increases your Fire damage by 5%, and increases the critical effect chance of your Fire spells by 5%. Voidwalker - Reduces Physical damage taken by 10%. Succubus - Increases your Shadow damage by 5%, and increases the critical effect chance of your Shadow spells by 5%. Felhunter - Reduces all spell damage taken by 10%. Felguard - Increases all damage done by 5%, and reduces all damage taken by 5%.

talents.name: Molten Core
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Immolate by 9 sec, and you have a 12% chance to gain the Molten Core effect when your Corruption deals damage. The Molten Core effect empowers your next 3 Incinerate or Soul Fire spells cast within 15 sec. Incinerate - Increases damage done by 18% and reduces cast time by 30%. Soul Fire - Increases damage done by 18% and increases critical strike chance by 15%.

talents.name: Demonic Resilience
talents.description: Reduces the chance you'll be critically hit by melee and spells by 3% and reduces all damage your summoned demon takes by 15%.

talents.name: Demonic Empowerment
talents.description: Grants the Warlock's summoned demon Empowerment. Imp - Increases the Imp's spell critical strike chance by 20% for 30 sec. Voidwalker - Increases the Voidwalker's health by 20%, and its threat generated from spells and attacks by 20% for 20 sec. Succubus and Incubus - Instantly vanishes, causing the demon to go into an improved Invisibility state. The vanish effect removes all stuns, snares and movement impairing effects from the demon. Felhunter - Dispels all magical effects from the Felhunter. Felguard - Increases the Felguard's attack speed by 20% and breaks all stun, snare and movement impairing effects and makes your Felguard immune to them for 15 sec.

talents.name: Demonic Knowledge
talents.description: Increases your spell damage by an amount equal to 12% of the total of your active demon's Stamina plus Intellect.

talents.name: Demonic Tactics
talents.description: Increases melee and spell critical strike chance for you and your summoned demon by 10%.

talents.name: Decimation
talents.description: When you Shadowbolt, Incinerate or Soul Fire a target that is at or below 35% health, the cast time of Soul Fire spell is reduced by 40% for 10 sec. Soul Fires cast under the effect of Decimation cost no shard.

talents.name: Improved Demonic Tactics
talents.description: Increases your summoned demon's critical strike chance equal to 30% of your critical strike chance.

talents.name: Summon Felguard
talents.description: Summons a Felguard under the command of the Warlock.

talents.name: Nemesis
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Demonic Empowerment, Metamorphosis, and Fel Domination spells by 30%.

talents.name: Demonic Pact
talents.description: Increases your spell damage by 10%, and your pet's criticals apply the Demonic Pact effect to your party or raid members. Demonic Pact increases spell power by 10% of your Spell Damage for 45 sec. This effect has a 5 sec cooldown. Does not work on Subjugated demons.

talents.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Shadow Bolt spell by 10%, and your Shadow Bolt has a 100% chance to cause your target to be vulnerable to spell damage, increasing spell critical strike chance against that target by 5%. Effect lasts 30 sec.

talents.name: Bane
talents.description: Reduces the casting time of your Shadow Bolt. Chaos Bolt and Immolate spells by 0.5 sec and your Soul Fire spell by 2 sec.

talents.name: Aftermath
talents.description: Increases the periodic damage done by your Immolate by 6%, and your Conflagrate has a 100% chance to daze the target for 5 sec.

talents.name: Molten Skin
talents.description: Reduces all damage taken by 6%.

talents.name: Cataclysm
talents.description: Reduces the Mana cost of your Destruction spells by 10%.

talents.name: Demonic Power
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Succubus' Lash of Pain spell by 6 sec. and reduces the casting time of your Imp's Firebolt spell by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Shadowburn
talents.description: Instantly blasts the target for 91 to 104 Shadow damage. If the target dies within 5 sec of Shadowburn, and yields experience or honor, the caster gains a Soul Shard.

talents.name: Ruin
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Destruction spells and your Imp's Firebolt spell by 100%.

talents.name: Intensity
talents.description: Reduces the pushback suffered from damaging attacks while casting or channeling any Destruction spell by 70%.

talents.name: Destructive Reach
talents.description: Increases the range of your Destruction spells by 20% and reduces threat caused by Destruction spells by 20%.

talents.name: Improved Searing Pain
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Searing Pain spell by 10%.

talents.name: Backlash
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance with spells by an additional 3% and gives you a 25% chance when hit by a physical attack to reduce the cast time of your next Shadow Bolt or Incinerate spell by 100%. This effect lasts 8 sec and will not occur more than once every 8 seconds.

talents.name: Improved Immolate
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Immolate spell by 30%.

talents.name: Devastation
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Destruction spells by 5%.

talents.name: Nether Protection
talents.description: After being hit with a spell, you have a 30% chance to gain Nether Protection, reducing all damage by that spell school by 30% for 8 sec.

talents.name: Emberstorm
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Fire spells by 15% and reduces the cast time of your Incinerate spell by 0.25 sec.

talents.name: Conflagrate
talents.description: Consumes an Immolate or Shadowflame effect on the enemy target to instantly deal damage equal to 60% of your Immolate or Shadowflame, and causes an additional 40% damage over 6 sec.

talents.name: Soul Leech
talents.description: Gives your Shadow Bolt, Shadowburn, Chaos Bolt, Soul Fire, Incinerate, Searing Pain and Conflagrate spells a 30% chance to return health equal to 20% of the damage caused.

talents.name: Pyroclasm
talents.description: When you critically strike with Searing Pain or Conflagrate, your Fire and Shadow spell damage is increased by 6% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Shadow and Flame
talents.description: Your Shadow Bolt, Shadowburn, Chaos Bolt and Incinerate spells gain an additional 20% of your bonus spell damage effects.

talents.name: Improved Soul Leech
talents.description: Your Soul Leech effect also restores mana to you and your summoned demon equal to 2% of maximum mana, and has a 100% chance to grant up to 10 party or raid members mana regeneration equal to 1% of maximum mana per 5 sec. Lasts for 15 sec.

talents.name: Backdraft
talents.description: When you cast Conflagrate, the cast time and global cooldown of your next three non-channeled, non-instant Destruction spells is reduced by 30%. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Shadowfury
talents.description: Shadowfury is unleashed, causing 357 to 422 Shadow damage and stunning all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.

talents.name: Empowered Imp
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Imp by 30%, and all critical hits done by your Imp have a 100% chance to increase your spell critical hit chance for your next spell by 100%. This effect lasts 8 sec.

talents.name: Fire and Brimstone
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Incinerate and Chaos Bolt spells to targets afflicted by your Immolate by 10%, and the critical strike chance of your Conflagrate spell is increased by 25%.

talents.name: Improved Heroic Strike
talents.description: Reduces the cost of your Heroic Strike ability by 3 rage points.

talents.name: Deflection
talents.description: Increases your Parry chance by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Rend
talents.description: Increases the bleed damage done by your Rend ability by 20%.

talents.name: Improved Charge
talents.description: Increases the amount of rage generated by your Charge ability by 10.

talents.name: Iron Will
talents.description: Reduces the duration of all Stun and Charm effects used against you by 20%.

talents.name: Tactical Mastery
talents.description: You retain up to an additional 15 of your rage points when you change stances. Also greatly increases the threat generated by your Bloodthirst and Mortal Strike abilities when you are in Defensive Stance (More effective than Rank 2).

talents.name: Improved Overpower
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Overpower ability by 50%.

talents.name: Anger Management
talents.description: Generates 1 rage per 3 seconds.

talents.name: Impale
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your abilities by 20%.

talents.name: Deep Wounds
talents.description: Your critical strikes cause the opponent to bleed, dealing 48% of your melee weapon's average damage over 6 sec.

talents.name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with two-handed melee weapons by 6%.

talents.name: Taste for Blood
talents.description: Whenever your Rend ability causes damage, you have a 100% chance of allowing the use of your Overpower ability for 9 sec. 1 charge. This effect will not occur more than once every 6 sec.

talents.name: Poleaxe Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike and the critical damage caused with Axes and Polearms by 5%.

talents.name: Sweeping Strikes
talents.description: Your next 5 melee attacks strike an additional nearby opponent.

talents.name: Mace Specialization
talents.description: Your attacks with maces ignore up to 15% of your opponent's armor.

talents.name: Sword Specialization
talents.description: Gives you a 10% chance to get an extra attack on the same target after hitting your target with your Sword. This effect cannot occur more than once every 6 seconds.

talents.name: Weapon Mastery
talents.description: Reduces the chance for your attacks to be dodged by 2% and reduces the duration of all Disarm effects used against you by 50%. This does not stack with other Disarm duration reducing effects.

talents.name: Improved Hamstring
talents.description: Gives your Hamstring ability a 15% chance to immobilize the target for 5 sec.

talents.name: Trauma
talents.description: Your melee critical strikes increase the effectiveness of Bleed effects on the target by 30% for 1 min.

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.description: Whenever you are struck by a Stun or Immobilize effect you will generate 20 rage and 10% of your total health over 10 sec.

talents.name: Mortal Strike
talents.description: A vicious strike that deals weapon damage plus 85 and wounds the target, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by 50% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Strength of Arms
talents.description: Increases your total Strength and Stamina by 4% and your Expertise by 4.

talents.name: Improved Slam
talents.description: Decreases the swing time of your Slam ability by 1 sec.

talents.name: Juggernaut
talents.description: Your Charge ability is now usable while in combat, but the cooldown on Charge is increased by 5 sec. Following a Charge, your next Slam or Mortal Strike has an additional 25% chance to critically hit if used within 10 sec.

talents.name: Improved Mortal Strike
talents.description: Increases the damage caused by your Mortal Strike ability by 10% and reduces the cooldown by 1 sec.

talents.name: Unrelenting Assault
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Overpower and Revenge abilities by 4 secs and increases the damage done by both abilities by 20%. In addition, if you strike a player with Overpower while they are casting, their magical damage and healing will be reduced by 50% for 6 sec.

talents.name: Sudden Death
talents.description: Your melee hits have a 9% chance of allowing the use of Execute regardless of the target's health state. In addition, you keep at least 10 rage after using Execute.

talents.name: Endless Rage
talents.description: You generate 25% more rage from damage dealt.

talents.name: Blood Frenzy
talents.description: Increases your melee attack speed by 10%. In addition your Rend and Deep Wounds abilities also increase all physical damage caused to that target by 4%.

talents.name: Wrecking Crew
talents.description: Your melee critical hits Enrage you, increasing all damage caused by 10% for 12 sec. This effect does not stack with Enrage.

talents.name: Armored to the Teeth
talents.description: Increases your attack power by 3 for every 108 armor value you have.

talents.name: Booming Voice
talents.description: Increases the area of effect and duration of your Battle Shout, Demoralizing Shout and Commanding Shout by 50%.

talents.name: Cruelty
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with melee weapons by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Demoralizing Shout
talents.description: Increases the melee attack power reduction of your Demoralizing Shout by 40%.

talents.name: Unbridled Wrath
talents.description: Gives you a chance to generate an additional rage point when you deal melee damage with a weapon. Effect occurs more often than Unbridled Wrath (Rank 4).

talents.name: Improved Cleave
talents.description: Increases the bonus damage done by your Cleave ability by 120%.

talents.name: Piercing Howl
talents.description: Causes all enemies within 10 yards to be Dazed, reducing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

talents.name: Blood Craze
talents.description: Regenerates 6% of your total Health over 6 sec after being the victim of a critical strike.

talents.name: Commanding Presence
talents.description: Increases the melee attack power bonus of your Battle Shout and the health bonus of your Commanding Shout by 25%.

talents.name: Dual Wield Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your offhand weapon by 25%.

talents.name: Improved Execute
talents.description: Reduces the rage cost of your Execute ability by 5.

talents.name: Enrage
talents.description: Gives you a 30% chance to receive a 10% damage bonus for 12 sec after being the victim of a damaging attack. This effect does not stack with Wrecking Crew.

talents.name: Precision
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with melee weapons by 3%.

talents.name: Death Wish
talents.description: When activated you become enraged, increasing your physical damage by 20% but increasing all damage taken by 5%. Lasts 30 sec.

talents.name: Improved Intercept
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Intercept ability by 10 sec.

talents.name: Improved Berserker Rage
talents.description: The Berserker Rage ability will generate 20 rage when used.

talents.name: Flurry
talents.description: Increases your attack speed by 25% for your next 3 swings after dealing a melee critical strike.

talents.name: Intensify Rage
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Bloodrage, Berserker Rage, Recklessness and Death Wish abilities by 33%.

talents.name: Bloodthirst
talents.description: Instantly attack the target causing (Attack power * 50 / 100) damage. In addition, the next 3 successful melee attacks will restore 1% of max health. This effect lasts 8 sec. Damage is based on your attack power.

talents.name: Improved Whirlwind
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Whirlwind ability by 20%.

talents.name: Furious Attacks
talents.description: Your normal melee attacks have a chance to reduce all healing done to the target by 25% for 10 sec. This can stack up to 2 times. This occurs more often than Furious Attacks (Rank 1)

talents.name: Improved Berserker Stance
talents.description: Increases Strength by 20% and reduces threat caused by 10% while in Berserker Stance.

talents.name: Heroic Fury
talents.description: Removes any Immobilization effects and refreshes the cooldown of your Intercept ability.

talents.name: Rampage
talents.description: Increases ranged and melee critical hit chance of all party and raid members within 100 yds by 5%.

talents.name: Bloodsurge
talents.description: Your Heroic Strike, Bloodthirst, and Whirlwind hits have a 20% chance of making your next Slam instant for 5 sec.

talents.name: Unending Fury
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Slam, Whirlwind and Bloodthirst abilities by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Bloodrage
talents.description: Increases the rage generated by your Bloodrage ability by 50%.

talents.name: Shield Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to block attacks with a shield by 5% and has a 100% chance to generate 5 rage when a block, dodge, or parry occurs.

talents.name: Improved Thunder Clap
talents.description: Reduces the cost of your Thunder Clap ability by 4 rage point and increases the damage by 30% and the slowing effect by an additional 10%.

talents.name: Incite
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Heroic Strike, Thunder Clap and Cleave abilities by 15%.

talents.name: Anticipation
talents.description: Increases your Dodge chance by 5%.

talents.name: Last Stand
talents.description: When activated, this ability temporarily grants you 30% of your maximum health for 20 sec. After the effect expires, the health is lost.

talents.name: Improved Revenge
talents.description: Increases damage of your Revenge ability by 60% and causes Revenge to strike an additional target.

talents.name: Shield Mastery
talents.description: Increases your block value by 30% and reduces the cooldown of your Shield Block ability by 20 sec.

talents.name: Toughness
talents.description: Increases your armor value from items by 10% and reduces the duration of all movement slowing effects by 30%.

talents.name: Improved Spell Reflection
talents.description: Reduces the chance you'll be hit by spells by 4% and when the ability is used it will reflect the first spell cast against the 4 closest party members within 20 yards.

talents.name: Improved Disarm
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Disarm ability by 20 sec and causes the target to take an additional 10% damage while disarmed.

talents.name: Puncture
talents.description: Reduces the rage cost of your Sunder Armor and Devastate abilities by 3.

talents.name: Improved Disciplines
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Shield Wall, Retaliation and Recklessness abilities by 60 secs.

talents.name: Concussion Blow
talents.description: Stuns the opponent for 5 sec and deals (38 / 100 * Attack power) damage (based on attack power).

talents.name: Gag Order
talents.description: Gives your Shield Bash and Heroic Throw abilities a 100% chance to silence the target for 3 sec and increases the damage of your Shield Slam ability by 10%.

talents.name: One-Handed Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases physical damage you deal when a one-handed melee weapon is equipped by 10%.

talents.name: Improved Defensive Stance
talents.description: While in Defensive Stance all spell damage is reduced by 6% and when you Block, Parry or Dodge an attack you have a 100% chance to become Enraged, increasing Physical damage caused by 10% for 12 sec.

talents.name: Vigilance
talents.description: Focus your protective gaze on a group or raid target, reducing their damage taken by 3% and transfers % of the threat they cause to you. In addition, each time they are hit by an attack your Taunt cooldown is refreshed. Lasts 30 min. This effect can only be on one target at a time.

talents.name: Focused Rage
talents.description: Reduces the rage cost of your offensive abilities by 3.

talents.name: Vitality
talents.description: Increases your total Strength by 6%, Stamina by 9% and your Expertise by 6.

talents.name: Safeguard
talents.description: Reduces damage taken by the target of your Intervene ability by 30% for 6 sec.

talents.name: Warbringer
talents.description: Your Charge, Intercept and Intervene abilities are now usable while in combat and in any stance. In addition, your Intervene ability will remove all movement impairing effects.

talents.name: Devastate
talents.description: Sunder the target's armor causing the Sunder Armor effect. In addition, causes 120% of weapon damage plus 58 for each application of Sunder Armor on the target. The Sunder Armor effect can stack up to 5 times.

talents.name: Critical Block
talents.description: Your successful blocks have a 60% chance to block double the normal amount and increases your chance to critically hit with your Shield Slam ability by an additional 15%.

talents.name: Sword and Board
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Devastate ability by 15% and when your Devastate or Revenge ability deals damage it has a 30% chance of refreshing the cooldown of your Shield Slam ability and reducing its cost by 100% for 5 sec.

talents.name: Damage Shield
talents.description: Whenever you take damage from or block a melee attack you cause damage equal to 20% of your block value.

capstones.name: Dancing Rune Weapon
capstones.description: Summons a second rune weapon that fights on its own for 12 sec, doing the same attacks as the Death Knight but for 50% reduced damage.

capstones.name: Howling Blast
capstones.description: Blast the target with a frigid wind dealing 198 to 214 Frost damage to all enemies within 10 yards.

capstones.name: Summon Gargoyle
capstones.description: A Gargoyle flies into the area and bombards the target with Nature damage modified by the Death Knight's attack power. Persists for 30 sec.

capstones.name: Starfall
capstones.description: You summon a flurry of stars from the sky on all targets within 30 yards of the caster, each dealing 145 to 167 Arcane damage. Also causes 26 Arcane damage to all other enemies within 5 yards of the enemy target. Maximum 20 stars. Lasts 10 sec. Shapeshifting into an animal form or mounting cancels the effect. Any effect which causes you to lose control of your character will suppress the starfall effect.

capstones.name: Berserk
capstones.description: When activated, this ability causes your Mangle (Bear) ability to hit up to 3 targets and have no cooldown, and reduces the energy cost of all your Cat Form abilities by 50%. Lasts 15 sec. You cannot use Tiger's Fury while Berserk is active. Clears the effect of Fear and makes you immune to Fear for the duration.

capstones.name: Wild Growth
capstones.description: Heals up to 5 friendly party or raid members within 15 yards of the target for 686 over 7 sec. The amount healed is applied quickly at first, and slows down as the Wild Growth reaches its full duration.

capstones.name: Beast Mastery
capstones.description: You master the art of Beast training, teaching you the ability to tame Exotic pets and increasing your total amount of Pet Skill Points by 4.

capstones.name: Chimera Shot
capstones.description: You deal 125% weapon damage, refreshing the current Sting on your target and triggering an effect: Serpent Sting - Instantly deals 40% of the damage done by your Serpent Sting. Viper Sting - Instantly restores mana to you equal to 60% of the total amount drained by your Viper Sting. Scorpid Sting - Attempts to Disarm the target for 10 sec. This effect cannot occur more than once per 1 minute.

capstones.name: Explosive Shot
capstones.description: You fire an explosive charge into the enemy target, dealing (Ranged attack power * 0.14 + 144)-(Ranged attack power * 0.14 + 172) Fire damage. The charge will blast the target every second for an additional 2 sec.

capstones.name: Arcane Barrage
capstones.description: Launches several missiles at the enemy target, causing 401 to 485 Arcane damage.

capstones.name: Living Bomb
capstones.description: The target becomes a Living Bomb, taking 612 Fire damage over 12 sec. After 12 sec or when the spell is dispelled, the target explodes dealing 306 Fire damage to all enemies within 10 yards.

capstones.name: Deep Freeze
capstones.description: Increases the damage caused by your Frostbolt, Frostfire Bolt and Ice Lance spells by 5% and reduces the movement speed of all chilled targets by an additional 10%.

capstones.name: Beacon of Light
capstones.description: The target becomes a Beacon of Light to all members of your party or raid within a 60 yard radius. Any heals you cast on party or raid members will also heal the Beacon for 100% of the amount healed. Only one target can be the Beacon of Light at a time. Lasts 1 min.

capstones.name: Hammer of the Righteous
capstones.description: Hammer the current target and up to 2 additional nearby targets, causing 4 times your main hand damage per second as Holy damage.

capstones.name: Divine Storm
capstones.description: An instant weapon attack that causes 110% of weapon damage to up to 4 enemies within 8 yards. The Divine Storm heals up to 3 party or raid members totaling 25% of the damage caused.

capstones.name: Penance
capstones.description: Launches a volley of holy light at the target, causing 240 Holy damage to an enemy, or 670 to 756 healing to an ally instantly and every 1 sec for 2 sec.

capstones.name: Guardian Spirit
capstones.description: Calls upon a guardian spirit to watch over the friendly target. The spirit increases the healing received by the target by 40%, and also prevents the target from dying by sacrificing itself. This sacrifice terminates the effect but heals the target of 50% of their maximum health. Lasts 10 sec.

capstones.name: Dispersion
capstones.description: You disperse into pure Shadow energy, reducing all damage taken by 90%. You are unable to attack or cast spells, but you regenerate 6% mana every 1 sec for 6 sec. Dispersion can be cast while stunned, feared or silenced and clears all snare and movement impairing effects when cast, and makes you immune to them while dispersed.

capstones.name: Hunger For Blood
capstones.description: Enrages you, increasing all damage caused by 5%. Requires a bleed effect to be active on the target. Lasts 1 min.

capstones.name: Killing Spree
capstones.description: Step through the shadows from enemy to enemy within 10 yards, attacking an enemy every .5 secs with both weapons until 5 assaults are made, and increasing all damage done by 20% for the duration. Can hit the same target multiple times. Cannot hit invisible or stealthed targets.

capstones.name: Shadow Dance
capstones.description: Enter the Shadow Dance for 6 sec, allowing the use of Sap, Garrote, Ambush, Cheap Shot, Premeditation, Pickpocket and Disarm Trap regardless of being stealthed.

capstones.name: Thunderstorm
capstones.description: You call down a bolt of lightning, energizing you and damaging nearby enemies within 10 yards. Restores 8% mana to you and deals 566 to 644 Nature damage to all nearby enemies, knocking them back 20 yards. This spell is usable while stunned.

capstones.name: Feral Spirit
capstones.description: Summons two Spirit Wolves under the command of the Shaman, lasting 45 sec.

capstones.name: Riptide
capstones.description: Heals a friendly target for 639 to 691 and another 665 over 15 sec. Your next Chain Heal cast on that primary target within 15 sec will consume the healing over time effect and increase the amount of the Chain Heal by 25%.

capstones.name: Haunt
capstones.description: You send a ghostly soul into the target, dealing 405 to 473 Shadow damage and increasing all damage done by your Shadow damage-over-time effects on the target by 20% for 12 sec. When the Haunt spell ends or is dispelled, the soul returns to you, healing you for 100% of the damage it did to the target.

capstones.name: Metamorphosis
capstones.description: You transform into a Demon for 30 sec. This form increases your armor by 600%, damage by 20%, reduces the chance you'll be critically hit by melee attacks by 6% and reduces the duration of stun and snare effects by 50%. You gain some unique demon abilities in addition to your normal abilities.

capstones.name: Chaos Bolt
capstones.description: Sends a bolt of chaotic fire at the enemy, dealing 864 to 1089 Fire damage. Chaos Bolt cannot be resisted, and pierces through all absorption effects.

capstones.name: Bladestorm
capstones.description: Instantly Whirlwind up to 4 nearby targets and for the next 6 sec you will perform a whirlwind attack every 1 sec. While under the effects of Bladestorm, you can move but cannot perform any other abilities but you do not feel pity or remorse or fear and you cannot be stopped unless killed.

capstones.name: Titan's Grip
capstones.description: Allows you to equip two-handed axes, maces and swords in one hand. While you have a two-handed weapon equipped in one hand, your physical damage done is reduced by 10%.

capstones.name: Shockwave
capstones.description: Sends a wave of force in front of the warrior, causing (75 / 100 * Attack power) damage (based on attack power) and stunning all enemy targets within 10 yards in a frontal cone for 4 sec.
